30614.title: Regression Discontinuity Evidence on the Effectiveness of the Minimum Legal E-Cigarette Purchasing Age
30614.zh_title: 最低合法电子烟购买年龄有效性的断点回归证据
30614.authors: Jeffrey S. DeSimone, Daniel S. Grossman, Nicolas R. Ziebarth
30614.abstract: Increases in youth vaping rates and concerns of a new generation of nicotine addicts recently prompted an increase in the federal minimum legal purchase age (MLPA) for tobacco products, including e-cigarettes, to 21 years. This study presents the first regression discontinuity evidence on the effectiveness of e-cigarette MLPA laws. Using data on 12th graders from Monitoring the Future, we obtain robust evidence that federal and state age-18 MLPAs decreased underage e-cigarette use by 15–20% and frequent use by 20–40%. These findings suggest that the age-21 federal MLPA could meaningfully reduce e-cigarette use among 18–20-year-olds.
30614.zh_abstract: 近年来青少年电子烟使用率上升以及对新一代尼古丁成瘾者的担忧，促使美国将包括电子烟在内的烟草产品联邦最低合法购买年龄提高至21岁。本研究首次提供了关于电子烟最低合法购买年龄法律有效性的断点回归证据。利用“监测未来”项目中12年级学生的数据，我们获得了稳健的证据，表明联邦和州层面的18岁最低合法购买年龄将未成年人电子烟使用率降低了15%至20%，将频繁使用率降低了20%至40%。这些发现表明，联邦21岁最低合法购买年龄可能显著减少18至20岁人群的电子烟使用。

30613.title: Understanding U.S. Inflation During the COVID Era
30613.zh_title: 理解新冠疫情时期的美国通胀
30613.authors: Laurence M. Ball, Daniel Leigh, Prachi Mishra
30613.abstract: This paper analyzes the dramatic rise in U.S. inflation since 2020, which we decompose into a rise in core inflation as measured by the weighted median inflation rate and deviations of headline inflation from core. We explain the rise in core with two factors, the tightening of the labor market as captured by the ratio of job vacancies to unemployment, and the pass-through into core from past shocks to headline inflation. The headline shocks themselves are explained largely by increases in energy prices and by supply chain problems as captured by backlogs of orders for goods and services. Looking forward, we simulate the future path of inflation for alternative paths of the unemployment rate, focusing on the projections of Federal Reserve policymakers in which unemployment rises only modestly to 4.4 percent. We find that this unemployment path returns inflation to near the Fed’s target only under optimistic assumptions about both inflation expectations and the Beveridge curve relating the unemployment and vacancy rates. Under less benign assumptions about these factors, the inflation rate remains well above target unless unemployment rises by more than the Fed projects.
30613.zh_abstract: 本文分析了自2020年以来美国通胀的急剧上升，我们将其分解为以加权中位数通胀率衡量的核心通胀上升，以及总体通胀与核心通胀的偏离。我们用两个因素来解释核心通胀的上升：以职位空缺与失业率之比衡量的劳动力市场收紧，以及过去总体通胀冲击向核心通胀的传导。总体通胀冲击本身在很大程度上可由能源价格上涨以及以商品和服务订单积压衡量的供应链问题来解释。展望未来，我们模拟了不同失业率路径下通胀的未来走势，重点关注美联储政策制定者的预测，即失业率仅温和上升至4.4%。我们发现，只有在关于通胀预期以及连接失业率和职位空缺率的贝弗里奇曲线都持乐观假设的情况下，这一失业率路径才能使通胀回到接近美联储目标的水平。如果对这些因素的假设不那么有利，除非失业率上升幅度超过美联储的预测，否则通胀率将远高于目标水平。

30612.title: AI, Skill, and Productivity: The Case of Taxi Drivers
30612.zh_title: 人工智能、技能与生产率：以出租车司机为例
30612.authors: Kyogo Kanazawa, Daiji Kawaguchi, Hitoshi Shigeoka, Yasutora Watanabe
30612.abstract: We examine the impact of Artificial Intelligence (AI) on productivity in the context of taxi drivers. The AI we study assists drivers with finding customers by suggesting routes along which the demand is predicted to be high. We find that AI improves drivers’ productivity by shortening the cruising time, and such gain is accrued only to low-skilled drivers, narrowing the productivity gap between high- and low-skilled drivers by 14%. The result indicates that AI's impact on human labor is more nuanced and complex than a job displacement story, which was the primary focus of existing studies.
30612.zh_abstract: 我们以出租车司机为背景，考察了人工智能对生产率的影响。我们研究的人工智能通过建议需求预计较高的路线来帮助司机寻找乘客。我们发现，人工智能通过缩短空驶时间提高了司机的生产率，而这种收益仅由低技能司机获得，使高技能与低技能司机之间的生产率差距缩小了14%。这一结果表明，人工智能对人类劳动的影响比现有研究主要关注的岗位替代故事更为微妙和复杂。
30612.meta: Programs：AG, LS, PR；JEL：J22, J24, L92, R41

30611.title: The Impact of Joint versus Separate Prediction Mode on Forecasting Accuracy
30611.zh_title: 联合预测模式与单独预测模式对预测准确性的影响
30611.authors: Alex Imas, Minah H. Jung, Silvia Saccardo, Joachim Vosgerau
30611.abstract: Forecasters predicting how people change their behavior in response to a treatment or intervention often consider a set of alternatives. In contrast, those who are treated are typically exposed to only one of the treatment alternatives. For example, managers selecting a wage schedule consider a set of alternative wages while employees are hired at a given rate. We show that forecasts made in joint-prediction mode—which considers a set of alternatives—generate predictions that expect substantially larger behavioral responses than those made in separate-prediction mode—which considers the response to only one treatment realization in isolation. Results show the latter to be more accurate in matching people’s actual responses to interventions and treatment changes. We present applications to managerial decision-making and forecasting of scientific results.
30611.zh_abstract: 预测人们如何改变其行为以应对某种治疗或干预的预测者，通常会考虑一系列备选方案。相比之下，接受治疗者通常只接触其中一种治疗方案。例如，选择工资方案的管理者会考虑一系列备选工资，而员工则以某一特定工资被雇佣。我们表明，在联合预测模式下做出的预测——即考虑一系列备选方案——所产生的预测，预期行为反应幅度显著大于在单独预测模式下做出的预测——即孤立地考虑对单一治疗实现的反应。结果显示，后者在匹配人们对干预和治疗变化的实际反应方面更为准确。我们展示了这些发现在管理决策和科学结果预测中的应用。

30610.title: Parenting Promotes Social Mobility Within and Across Generations
30610.zh_title: 养育方式促进代内与代际社会流动
30610.authors: Jorge Luis García, James J. Heckman
30610.abstract: This paper compares early childhood enrichment programs that promote social mobility for disadvantaged children within and across generations. Instead of conducting a standard meta-analysis, we present a harmonized primary data analysis of programs that shape current policy. Our analysis is a template for rigorous syntheses and comparisons across programs. We analyze new long-run life-cycle data collected for iconic programs when participants are middle-aged and their children are in their twenties. The iconic programs are omnibus in nature and offer many services to children and their parents. We compare them with relatively low-cost more focused home-visiting programs. Successful interventions target both children and their caregivers. They engage caregivers and improve the home lives of children. They permanently boost cognitive and non-cognitive skills. Participants in programs that enrich home environments grow up with better skills, jobs, earnings, marital stability, and health, as well as reduced participation in crime. Long-run monetized gains are substantially greater than program costs for iconic programs. We investigate the mechanisms promoting successful family lives for participants and find intergenerational effects on their children. A study of focused home-visiting programs that target parents enables us to isolate a crucial component of successful programs: they activate and promote parenting skills of child caregivers. The home-visiting programs we analyze produce outcomes comparable to those of the iconic omnibus programs. National implementation of the programs with long-run follow up that we analyze would substantially shrink the overall US Black-White earnings gap.
30610.zh_abstract: 本文比较了旨在促进弱势儿童代内与代际社会流动的早期儿童充实项目。我们没有进行标准的元分析，而是对塑造当前政策的标志性项目进行了统一的原始数据分析。我们的分析为跨项目的严格综合与比较提供了一个模板。我们分析了在参与者步入中年且其子女二十多岁时收集的新的长期生命周期数据。这些标志性项目本质上是综合性的，为儿童及其父母提供多种服务。我们将它们与成本相对较低、更聚焦的家访项目进行比较。成功的干预措施同时针对儿童及其照料者。它们吸引照料者参与，改善儿童的家庭生活，并永久性地提升认知与非认知技能。参与那些丰富家庭环境项目的儿童，成年后拥有更好的技能、工作、收入、婚姻稳定性、健康状况，并减少了犯罪参与。对于标志性项目而言，长期货币化收益远大于项目成本。我们研究了促进参与者成功家庭生活的机制，并发现了对其子女的代际影响。一项针对以父母为目标的聚焦家访项目的研究，使我们能够分离出成功项目的一个关键组成部分：它们激活并提升了儿童照料者的养育技能。我们分析的家访项目产生的结果与标志性综合项目相当。我们分析的这些具有长期跟踪研究的项目若在全国范围内实施，将大幅缩小美国黑人与白人之间的整体收入差距。
30610.meta: Programs：CH, ED；JEL：D13, J13, J18, J24, J31

30609.title: The U.S. Postal Savings System and the Collapse of B&Ls During the Great Depression
30609.zh_title: 美国邮政储蓄系统与大萧条时期建筑贷款协会的崩溃
30609.authors: Sebastián Fleitas, Matthew S. Jaremski, Steven Sprick Schuster
30609.abstract: Building and Loan Associations (B&Ls) financed over half of new houses constructed in the U.S. during the 1920s but they lost their predominance within the following decades as they were pushed to convert into Savings and Loans (S&Ls). This study examines whether the U.S. government-insured Postal Savings System attracted funds away from B&Ls precisely when they needed them the most in the Great Depression. Annual town- and county-level data from 1920 through 1935 for 3 states show that the sudden rise in local postal savings was associated with local downturns in B&Ls. Using a panel vector autoregression, we find that postal savings significantly reduced the amount of money in B&Ls, yet B&Ls had no significant effect on postal savings banks. Alternatively, postal savings had no significant effect on commercial banks. The results suggest that this competitive dynamic prevented B&Ls from rebounding in the mid-1930s and helped contribute to Great Depression’s local real estate lending decline.
30609.zh_abstract: 在20世纪20年代，建筑贷款协会为美国一半以上的新建房屋提供了融资，但在随后的几十年里，由于被迫转变为储蓄贷款协会，它们失去了主导地位。本研究考察了美国政府担保的邮政储蓄系统是否在大萧条时期，恰恰在建筑贷款协会最需要资金的时候，吸走了它们的资金。来自三个州1920年至1935年的年度城镇和县级数据显示，当地邮政储蓄的突然增加与当地建筑贷款协会的衰退相关。使用面板向量自回归模型，我们发现邮政储蓄显著减少了建筑贷款协会中的资金量，而建筑贷款协会对邮政储蓄银行没有显著影响。另外，邮政储蓄对商业银行没有显著影响。结果表明，这种竞争动态阻止了建筑贷款协会在20世纪30年代中期复苏，并加剧了大萧条时期地方房地产贷款的下降。

30608.title: The Productivity of Professions: Evidence from the Emergency Department
30608.zh_title: 专业人员的生产率：来自急诊科的证据
30608.authors: David C. Chan Jr, Yiqun Chen
30608.abstract: This paper studies the productivity of nurse practitioners (NPs) and physicians, two professions performing overlapping tasks but with starkly different backgrounds, training, and pay. Using quasi-experimental variation in patient assignment to NPs versus physicians in Veterans Health Administration emergency departments, we find that, on average, NPs use more resources and exhibit a higher 30-day preventable hospitalization rate than physicians. However, the NP-physician performance difference varies by case complexity and severity. Importantly, even larger productivity variation exists within each profession, leading to substantial overlap between the productivity distributions of the two professions; NPs outperform physicians in 38 percent of random pairs.
30608.zh_abstract: 本文研究了执业护士和医生这两类从事重叠任务但背景、培训和薪酬截然不同的专业人员的生产率。利用退伍军人健康管理局急诊科中患者被随机分配给执业护士或医生的准实验变异，我们发现，平均而言，执业护士比医生使用更多资源，并且30天可预防住院率更高。然而，执业护士与医生的绩效差异因病例复杂性和严重程度而异。重要的是，每个专业内部的生产率差异甚至更大，导致两个专业的生产率分布存在大量重叠；在38%的随机配对中，执业护士的表现优于医生。
30608.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PR；JEL：I11, I18, J24, J44, M53

30607.title: Artificial Intelligence, the Evolution of the Healthcare Value Chain, and the Future of the Physician
30607.zh_title: 人工智能、医疗价值链的演变与医生的未来
30607.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is transforming production across all sectors of the economy, with the potential to both complement and substitute for traditional labor inputs. Healthcare is no exception. Dozens of recent academic studies demonstrate that AI can contribute to the healthcare value chain, by improving both diagnostic accuracy and treatment recommendations. In these ways, AI may wither complement or substitute for physicians. We argue that AI represents the culmination of decades of efforts to enhance medical decision making. Using an historical lens that considers long-standing institutional features of healthcare markets, we identify numerous obstacles to the implementation of AI in medical care, and identify which specialties are most at risk for substitution by AI.
30607.zh_abstract: 人工智能正在改变经济所有部门的生产方式，并有可能补充和替代传统的劳动力投入。医疗保健也不例外。最近数十项学术研究表明，人工智能可以通过提高诊断准确性和治疗建议来为医疗价值链做出贡献。在这些方面，人工智能可能补充或替代医生。我们认为，人工智能代表了数十年来改进医疗决策努力的高潮。通过一个考虑医疗市场长期制度特征的历史视角，我们识别了在医疗保健中实施人工智能的众多障碍，并指出了哪些专科最有可能被人工智能替代。

30606.title: Should Mothers Work? How Perceptions of the Social Norm Affect Individual Attitudes Toward Work in the U.S.
30606.zh_title: 母亲应该工作吗？社会规范认知如何影响美国个体对工作的态度
30606.authors: Patricia Cortés, Gizem Koşar, Jessica Pan, Basit Zafar
30606.abstract: We study how peer beliefs shape individual attitudes toward maternal labor supply using realistic hypothetical scenarios that elicit recommendations on the labor supply choices of a mother with a young child and an information treatment embedded within representative surveys. Across the scenarios, we find that individuals systematically overestimate the extent of gender conservativeness of the people around them. Exposure to information on peer beliefs leads to a shift in recommendations, driven largely by information-based belief updating. The information treatment also increases (intended and actual) donations to a non-profit organization advocating for women in the workplace.
30606.zh_abstract: 我们利用现实假设情景（这些情景引发关于有幼儿母亲劳动供给选择的建议）以及嵌入在代表性调查中的信息处理，研究同伴信念如何塑造个体对母亲劳动供给的态度。在各种情景中，我们发现个体系统性地高估了周围人群的性别保守程度。接触同伴信念信息会导致建议的转变，这主要由基于信息的信念更新驱动。信息处理还增加了向倡导职场女性权益的非营利组织的（意向和实际）捐赠。

30605.title: Epidemiological Expectations
30605.abstract: ‘Epidemiological’ models of belief formation put social interactions at their core; such models are widely used by scholars who are not economists to study the dynamics of beliefs in populations. We survey the literature in which economists attempting to model the consequences of beliefs about the future – ‘expectations’ – have employed a full-fledged epidemiological approach to explore an economic question. We draw connections to related work on ‘contagion,’ narrative economics, news/rumor spreading, and the spread of internet memes. A main theme of the paper is that a number of independent developments have recently converged to make epidemiological expectations (‘EE’) modeling more feasible and appealing than in the past.
30605.zh_abstract: 信念形成的“流行病学”模型将社会互动置于核心地位；这类模型被非经济学学者广泛用于研究群体中信念的动态变化。我们综述了经济学家在尝试建模关于未来的信念（即“预期”）的后果时，采用完整流行病学方法探索经济问题的文献。我们将其与关于“传染”、叙事经济学、新闻/谣言传播以及互联网模因传播的相关研究联系起来。本文的一个主要主题是，近期若干独立发展已汇聚在一起，使得流行病学预期建模比过去更加可行且更具吸引力。
30605.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, ME；JEL：D81, D91, E71, G41

30604.title: Why Do Startups Become Unicorns Instead of Going Public?
30604.zh_title: 为什么初创企业成为独角兽而非上市？
30604.authors: Daria Davydova, Rüdiger Fahlenbrach, Leandro Sanz, René M. Stulz
30604.abstract: Unicorns are startups that choose to stay private even though they are large enough to go public. We propose an efficiency explanation for their existence. Startups relying highly on organization capital are more vulnerable to expropriation of their organization capital if they go public before their position is sufficiently secure. Our main empirical findings are that shocks to the fragility of organization capital decrease the IPO likelihood, unicorn status enables startups to stay private longer by giving them access to new sources of capital, and unicorns and their industries have higher organization capital intensity than other startups.
30604.zh_abstract: 独角兽是指那些规模已足够上市却选择保持私有的初创企业。我们提出一个效率解释来说明其存在的原因。高度依赖组织资本的初创企业，如果在地位尚未足够稳固时上市，其组织资本更容易被侵占。我们的主要实证发现是：组织资本脆弱性的冲击会降低IPO可能性；独角兽地位通过赋予初创企业获取新资本来源的渠道，使其能够更长时间保持私有；独角兽及其所在行业的组织资本密集度高于其他初创企业。

30603.title: Mapping the Knowledge Space: Exploiting Unassisted Machine Learning Tools
30603.zh_title: 绘制知识空间：利用无辅助机器学习工具
30603.authors: Florenta Teodoridis, Jino Lu, Jeffrey L. Furman
30603.abstract: Understanding factors affecting the direction of innovation is a central aim of research in the economics of innovation. Progress on this topic has been inhibited by difficulties in measuring distance and movement in knowledge space. We describe a methodology that infers the mapping of the knowledge landscape based on text documents. The approach is based on an unassisted machine learning technique, Hierarchical Dirichlet Process (HDP), which flexibly identifies patterns in text corpora. The resulting mapping of the knowledge landscape enables calculations of distance and movement, measures that are valuable in several contexts for research in innovation. We benchmark and demonstrate the benefits of this approach in the context of 44 years of USPTO data.
30603.zh_abstract: 理解影响创新方向的因素是创新经济学研究的核心目标。由于难以衡量知识空间中的距离和移动，这一主题的进展受到阻碍。我们描述了一种基于文本文档推断知识景观映射的方法论。该方法基于无辅助机器学习技术——层次狄利克雷过程，该过程能灵活识别文本语料库中的模式。由此产生的知识景观映射能够计算距离和移动，这些度量在创新研究的多个情境中具有价值。我们以44年的USPTO数据为背景，对该方法进行了基准测试并展示了其优势。

30602.title: The Ex-Ante Moral Hazard Effects of COVID-19 Vaccines
30602.zh_title: COVID-19疫苗的事前道德风险效应
30602.authors: Virat Agrawal, Neeraj Sood, Christopher M. Whaley
30602.abstract: A long-standing economic question is how protection against harm from insurance or other harm reducing interventions leads to potentially offsetting behavior changes (ex-ante moral hazard). Immunization is a type of insurance, as individuals incur an upfront cost when they get vaccinated, but it protects individuals if they are exposed to a vaccine preventable disease. In this study, we empirically evaluate the ex-ante moral hazard effects of COVID-19 vaccines. First, exploiting the discontinuity in vaccination rates at age 65 due to early eligibility of older population, we compared vaccination rates and risk mitigation behavior between those just above and just below 65 years of age. We find no evidence of decrease in risk mitigating behavior among the 65 years old and older population. Second, leveraging state-level variation in the timing of when people in different age groups became eligible for vaccination, we estimate that COVID-19 vaccination has no effect on risk mitigating behaviors in adult population. Our findings imply minimal moral hazard effects of COVID-19 vaccines in the short-term.
30602.zh_abstract: 一个长期存在的经济学问题是，来自保险或其他减少伤害干预措施的保护如何导致潜在的抵消性行为变化（事前道德风险）。免疫接种是一种保险形式，因为个体在接种疫苗时承担前期成本，但如果暴露于疫苗可预防的疾病，它又能保护个体。在本研究中，我们实证评估了COVID-19疫苗的事前道德风险效应。首先，利用65岁因老年人口提前接种资格导致的疫苗接种率不连续性，我们比较了略高于和略低于65岁人群的疫苗接种率和风险缓解行为。我们没有发现65岁及以上人群风险缓解行为减少的证据。其次，利用不同年龄组人群获得疫苗接种资格时间点的州级差异，我们估计COVID-19疫苗接种对成年人口的风险缓解行为没有影响。我们的发现意味着COVID-19疫苗在短期内具有最小的道德风险效应。

30601.title: A Theory of Fiscal Responsibility and Irresponsibility
30601.zh_title: 财政责任与不负责任的理论
30601.abstract: We propose a political economy mechanism that explains the presence of fiscal regimes punctuated by crisis periods. Our model focuses on the interaction between successive deficit-biased governments subject to i.i.d. fiscal shocks. We show that the economy transitions between a fiscally responsible regime and a fiscally irresponsible regime, with transitions occurring during crises when fiscal needs are large. Under fiscal responsibility, governments limit their spending to avoid transitioning to fiscal irresponsibility. Under fiscal irresponsibility, governments spend excessively and precipitate crises that lead to the reinstatement of fiscal responsibility. Regime transitions can only occur if governments' deficit bias is large enough.
30601.zh_abstract: 我们提出一个政治经济学机制，用以解释以危机时期为标志的财政体制的存在。我们的模型聚焦于连续几届存在赤字偏好的政府之间的互动，这些政府面临独立同分布的财政冲击。我们表明，经济在财政负责体制和财政不负责任体制之间转换，转换发生在财政需求巨大的危机时期。在财政负责体制下，政府限制支出以避免转向财政不负责任。在财政不负责任体制下，政府过度支出并引发危机，从而导致财政负责体制的恢复。只有当政府的赤字偏好足够大时，体制转换才可能发生。
30601.meta: Programs：EFG, PE, POL；JEL：C73, D02, D82, E6, H1, P16

30600.title: Modeling Machine Learning: A Cognitive Economic Approach
30600.zh_title: 建模机器学习：一种认知经济学方法
30600.authors: Andrew Caplin, Daniel J. Martin, Philip Marx
30600.abstract: We apply methodological innovations from cognitive economics that were designed to study human cognition to instead better understand machine learning. We first show that the folk theory of machine learning – that an algorithms learns optimally to minimize the loss function used in training – rests on a shaky foundation. We then identify a path forward by translating ideas from the costly learning branch of cognitive economics. We find that changes in the loss function impact learning just as they might if the algorithm was a rational human being who found learning costly according to a revealed pseudo-cost function that may or may not correspond to actual resource costs. Our approach can be leveraged to determine more effective loss functions given a third party’s objective, be it a firm or a policy maker.
30600.zh_abstract: 我们应用认知经济学中旨在研究人类认知的方法论创新，来更好地理解机器学习。我们首先表明，机器学习的民间理论——即算法最优地学习以最小化训练中使用的损失函数——基础并不稳固。然后，我们通过转化认知经济学中成本学习分支的思想，确定了一条前进路径。我们发现，损失函数的变化对学习的影响，就如同该算法是一个理性人，其学习成本根据一个可能与实际资源成本相符也可能不符的揭示性伪成本函数来衡量一样。我们的方法可用于根据第三方（无论是企业还是政策制定者）的目标来确定更有效的损失函数。

30634.title: Give Me a Pass: Flexible Credit for Entrepreneurs in Colombia
30634.zh_title: 给我一个通行证：哥伦比亚企业家的灵活信贷
30634.authors: Lasse Brune, Xavier Giné, Dean Karlan
30634.abstract: Although microcredit has reached millions, recent randomized evaluations find limited average business impacts. Contract rigidity, specifically the fixed and frequent installments, may restrict moral hazard but limit productive risk-taking, thus limiting the impact. With a Colombian lender, we experimentally compared, for a sample of new borrowers, a standard rigid loan to a more flexible loan that included three “passes” with which borrowers could delay repayments. The flexible loan led to some shifts in investment behavior but had no average impact on revenue, profit level, or profit variance, and led to higher default.
30634.zh_abstract: 尽管小额信贷已覆盖数百万人，但最近的随机评估发现其平均商业影响有限。合同刚性，特别是固定且频繁的分期付款，可能限制了道德风险，但也限制了生产性风险承担，从而限制了影响。我们与一家哥伦比亚贷款机构合作，针对新借款人样本，实验性地比较了标准刚性贷款与一种更灵活的贷款，后者包含三个“通行证”，借款人可以用其延迟还款。灵活贷款导致了一些投资行为的转变，但对收入、利润水平或利润方差没有平均影响，并导致了更高的违约率。

30633.title: Smiles in Profiles: Improving Fairness and Efficiency Using Estimates of User Preferences in Online Marketplaces
30633.zh_title: 资料中的微笑：利用在线市场中用户偏好的估计提高公平性和效率
30633.authors: Susan Athey, Dean Karlan, Emil Palikot, Yuan Yuan
30633.abstract: Online platforms often have conflicting goals: they face tradeoffs between increasing efficiency and reducing disparities, where the latter may relate to objectives such as the longer-term health of the marketplace or the organization’s mission. We examine how participants’ profile pictures shape this trade-off in the context of a peer-to-peer lending platform. We develop and apply an approach to estimate marketplace participants’ preferences for different profile features, distinguishing between (i) "type" (e.g., gender, age) and (ii) "style" (e.g., smiling in the photo). Relative to type, style features are easier to change, and platforms may be more willing to encourage such changes. Our approach starts by using causal inference methods together with computer vision algorithms applied to observational data to identify type and style features of profiles that appear to affect demand for transactions. We further decompose type-based disparities into a component driven by demand for certain types and a component that arises because different types have different distributions of style features; we find that style differences exacerbate type-based disparities. To improve internal validity, we then carry out two randomized survey experiments using generative models to create multiple versions of profile images that differ in one feature at a time. We then evaluate counterfactual platform policies based on the changeable profile features and identify approaches that can ameliorate the disparity-efficiency tension. We identify marketplace feedback effects, where encouraging certain style choices attracts participants who value these choices.
30633.zh_abstract: 在线平台通常面临相互冲突的目标：它们在提高效率和减少差异之间面临权衡，后者可能与市场长期健康或组织使命等目标相关。我们研究了在点对点借贷平台背景下，参与者的个人资料照片如何塑造这种权衡。我们开发并应用了一种方法来估计市场参与者对不同资料特征的偏好，区分（i）“类型”（例如，性别、年龄）和（ii）“风格”（例如，照片中微笑）。与类型相比，风格特征更容易改变，平台可能更愿意鼓励这种改变。我们的方法首先使用因果推断方法以及应用于观测数据的计算机视觉算法，来识别似乎影响交易需求的资料类型和风格特征。我们进一步将基于类型的差异分解为由对某些类型的需求驱动的部分，以及由于不同类型具有不同风格特征分布而产生的部分；我们发现风格差异加剧了基于类型的差异。为了提高内部有效性，我们随后进行了两项随机调查实验，使用生成模型创建每次仅在一个特征上有所不同的多个版本的个人资料图像。然后，我们基于可改变的资料特征评估反事实平台政策，并确定可以缓解差异-效率紧张关系的方法。我们识别了市场反馈效应，即鼓励某些风格选择会吸引重视这些选择的参与者。
30633.meta: Programs：DEV, LE, LS；JEL：D0, D40, J0, J02, O1

30632.title: Effects of the Earned Income Tax Credit for Childless Adults: A Regression Discontinuity Approach
30632.zh_title: 无子女成年人劳动所得税抵免的效果：断点回归方法
30632.abstract: Most antipoverty policy in the United States focuses on families with children, but efforts to assist childless adults have gained traction in recent years. We examine the impact of the Earned Income Tax Credit on the labor force outcomes of childless adults using the age-25 eligibility discontinuity. We find no impacts on labor force participation and employment outcomes, which may be due to lack of information about the credit, lack of behavioral response due to its small size, or that childless adults already have very high labor force participation rates.
30632.zh_abstract: 美国大多数反贫困政策针对有子女的家庭，但近年来帮助无子女成年人的努力逐渐获得关注。我们利用25岁年龄资格断点，研究劳动所得税抵免对无子女成年人劳动力市场结果的影响。我们发现该政策对劳动力参与和就业结果没有显著影响，这可能是因为缺乏对该抵免的了解、其规模较小导致行为反应不足，或者无子女成年人的劳动力参与率已经很高。

30631.title: Legal Activism, State Policy, and Racial Inequality in Teacher Salaries and Educational Attainment in the Mid-Century American South
30631.zh_title: 法律行动、州政策与种族不平等：20世纪中期美国南部的教师工资与教育成就
30631.authors: Elizabeth U. Cascio, Ethan G. Lewis
30631.abstract: In the late 1930s, the NAACP launched a campaign to equalize Black and white teacher salaries in the de jure segregated schools of the American South. Using newly collected county panel data spanning three decades, this paper first documents heterogeneous within-state impacts of the campaign on teacher salaries. In states that reinforced successful NAACP litigation by introducing universal minimum salary schedules based on objective criteria, the relatively large wage penalty historically suffered by Black teachers in districts with higher Black enrollment shares disappeared by the mid-1950s. In states that resisted by adopting salary schedules using the National Teacher Examination as a measure of teaching efficacy, that penalty remained. In the second part of the paper, we estimate the effect of teacher pay on educational attainment exploiting variation in Black salary gains over time across counties with different Black enrollment shares, and across states by whether subsequent state policy reinforced or resisted court rulings favorable to the NAACP. We find that Black teacher salary gains contributed to the large reductions in racial inequality in school enrollment and grade progression in the South at mid-century.
30631.zh_abstract: 在20世纪30年代末，全国有色人种协进会发起了一场运动，旨在使美国南部法律上实行种族隔离的学校中黑人与白人教师工资平等。利用新收集的跨越三十年的县级面板数据，本文首先记录了该运动对教师工资在州内产生的异质性影响。在那些通过引入基于客观标准的统一最低工资表来强化全国有色人种协进会成功诉讼的州，历史上黑人教师在高黑人入学率地区遭受的相对较大的工资惩罚到20世纪50年代中期消失了。在那些通过采用以国家教师考试作为教学效能衡量标准的工资表来抵制的州，这种惩罚依然存在。在论文的第二部分，我们利用不同黑人入学率县之间黑人工资增长随时间的变化，以及各州后续政策是强化还是抵制有利于全国有色人种协进会的法院裁决，来估计教师工资对教育成就的影响。我们发现，黑人教师工资的增长促进了20世纪中期美国南部在入学率和年级晋升方面种族不平等的大幅减少。
30631.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, LS, POL；JEL：H7, I2, J15, N32

30630.title: Disaggregated Economic Accounts
30630.authors: Asger L. Andersen, Kilian Huber, Niels Johannesen, Ludwig Straub, Emil Toft Vestergaard
30630.abstract: We develop a system of disaggregated economic accounts. The system breaks down national accounting positions into bilateral flows between consistently defined groups of consumers (“consumer cells”), groups of producers (“producer cells”), the government, and the rest of the world. We disaggregate the full circular flow of money, including consumer spending, labor compensation, firm profits, trade in intermediates, foreign trade, and government transactions, while satisfying all national accounting identities. We implement the disaggregated system for small region-by-industry cells in Denmark and present stylized facts, including variation in domestic spending shares, local and urban bias in consumer spending, and a pattern of “triangular flows” across regions. Cell-level measures of “spending intensity” capture how much spending by a cell contributes to the income of cells experiencing unemployment after a shock. Using a general equilibrium model, we show that fiscal transfers are more effective in stimulating aggregate GDP when they target cells with high spending intensity on unemployed cells. Knowledge of the disaggregated economic accounts helps governments select more effective policies.
30630.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一套分项经济账户体系。该体系将国民核算项目分解为一致定义的消费者群体（“消费者单元”）、生产者群体（“生产者单元”）、政府和世界其他地区之间的双边流量。我们对货币的完整循环流动进行分项，包括消费者支出、劳动报酬、企业利润、中间品贸易、对外贸易和政府交易，同时满足所有国民核算恒等式。我们在丹麦的小区域-行业单元层面实施了这套分项体系，并呈现了一些典型事实，包括国内支出份额的差异、消费者支出中的本地和城市偏向，以及跨区域的“三角流动”模式。单元层面的“支出强度”衡量了一个单元的支出在多大程度上贡献于遭受冲击后经历失业的单元的收入。利用一个一般均衡模型，我们表明，当财政转移支付针对那些对失业单元具有高支出强度的单元时，在刺激总GDP方面更为有效。了解分项经济账户有助于政府选择更有效的政策。
30630.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, ITI, ME, PE；JEL：E01, E1, E20, F4, G5, R1

30629.title: How Substitutable Are Workers? Evidence from Worker Deaths
30629.zh_title: 工人的可替代性有多高？来自工人死亡的证据
30629.abstract: We estimate how exogenous worker exits affect firms’ demand for incumbent workers and new hires. Drawing on administrative data from Germany, we analyze 34,000 unexpected worker deaths, which, on average, raise the remaining workers’ wages and retention probabilities. The average effect masks substantial heterogeneity: Coworkers in the same occupation as the deceased see positive wage effects; coworkers in other occupations experience wage decreases when a high-skilled or specialized worker dies. Our findings imply substantial replacement costs, which are larger in thin markets and when skills are specialized.
30629.zh_abstract: 我们估计了外生的工人离职如何影响企业对在职员工和新招聘员工的需求。利用德国的行政数据，我们分析了34,000例意外的工人死亡事件。平均而言，这些事件提高了剩余工人的工资和留任概率。平均效应掩盖了显著的异质性：与逝者同一职业的同事看到了积极的工资效应；而当高技能或专业化工人去世时，其他职业的同事则经历了工资下降。我们的发现意味着可观的替代成本，这些成本在劳动力市场较薄和技能专业化程度较高时更大。

30628.title: The NBER Orange Book Dataset: A User’s Guide
30628.zh_title: NBER橙皮书数据集：用户指南
30628.authors: Maya Durvasula, C. Scott Hemphill, Lisa Larrimore Ouellette, Bhaven N. Sampat, Heidi L. Williams
30628.abstract: This paper introduces a newly digitized, open-access version of the Food and Drug Administration’s “Orange Book”—a linkage between approved small-molecule drugs and the patents that protect them. The Orange Book also reports any applicable regulatory exclusivity that prevents competitive entry. We summarize the Orange Book’s coverage and discuss the opportunities and challenges associated with using these data for research. Empirical validations against various administrative datasets suggest that Orange Book records are, largely, complete and accurate. We conclude with a specific use case—calculating legal exclusivity periods for drugs—to highlight the types of choices that researchers must make when using this resource.
30628.zh_abstract: 本文介绍了美国食品药品监督管理局“橙皮书”的一个新近数字化、开放获取的版本——该文件将已批准的小分子药物与保护它们的专利联系起来。橙皮书还报告了任何可能阻止竞争性进入的适用监管排他期。我们总结了橙皮书的覆盖范围，并讨论了使用这些数据进行研究的机会和挑战。针对各种行政数据集的实证验证表明，橙皮书记录在很大程度上是完整和准确的。我们以一个具体的使用案例——计算药物的法定排他期——作为结尾，以强调研究人员在使用这一资源时必须做出的选择类型。

30627.title: Heterogeneity in School Value-Added and the Private Premium
30627.zh_title: 学校增值的异质性与私立学校溢价
30627.authors: Tahir Andrabi, Natalie Bau, Jishnu Das, Asim Ijaz Khwaja
30627.abstract: Using rich panel data from Pakistan, we compute test score based measures of quality (School Value-Addeds or SVAs) for more than 800 schools across 112 villages and verify that they are valid and unbiased. With the SVA measures, we then document three striking features of the schooling environment. First, there is substantial within-village variation in quality. The annualized difference in learning between the best and worst performing school in the same village is 0.4 sd; compounded over 5 years of primary schooling, this difference is similar in size to the test score gap between low- and high-income countries. Second, students learn more in private schools (0.15 sd per year on average), but substantial within-sector variation in quality means that the effects of reallocating students from public to private schools can range from -0.35sd to +0.65sd. Thus, there is a range of possible causal estimates of the private premium, a feature of the environment we illustrate using three different identification approaches. Finally, parents appear to recognize and reward SVA in the private sector, but the link between parental demand and SVA is weaker in the public sector. These results have implications for both the measurement of the private premium and how we design and evaluate policies that reallocate children across schools, such as school closures and vouchers.
30627.zh_abstract: 利用来自巴基斯坦的丰富面板数据，我们为横跨112个村庄的800多所学校计算了基于考试成绩的质量衡量指标（学校增值），并验证了这些指标是有效且无偏的。利用学校增值指标，我们随后记录了学校环境的三个显著特征。首先，同一村庄内的学校质量存在显著差异。同一村庄中表现最好和最差学校之间的年化学习差异为0.4个标准差；在五年的小学教育中累积，这一差异与低收入和高收入国家之间的考试成绩差距规模相似。其次，学生在私立学校学习更多（平均每年0.15个标准差），但部门内质量的显著差异意味着将学生从公立学校重新分配到私立学校的效果范围可以从-0.35个标准差到+0.65个标准差。因此，私立学校溢价存在一系列可能的因果估计值，这是我们利用三种不同识别方法说明的环境特征。最后，父母似乎能够识别并奖励私立部门的学校增值，但在公立部门，父母需求与学校增值之间的联系较弱。这些结果对私立学校溢价的衡量以及我们如何设计和评估将儿童在学校间重新分配的政策（如学校关闭和代金券）都有启示。
30627.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS；JEL：H44, I21, I25, I28, O12

30626.title: Air Quality and Suicide
30626.abstract: We conduct the first-ever large-scale study of the relationship between air pollution and suicide using detailed cause of death data from all death certificates in the U.S. between 2003 and 2010. Using wind direction as an instrument for daily pollution exposure, we find that a 1 μg/m3 increase in daily PM2.5 is associated with a 0.49% increase in daily suicides and 0.171 more suicide-related hospitalizations (a 50% increase). Estimates using 2SLS are larger and more robust, suggesting a bias towards zero arising from measurement error. Event study estimates further illustrate that contemporaneous pollution exposure matters more than exposure to pollution in previous weeks.
30626.zh_abstract: 我们利用2003年至2010年间美国所有死亡证明的详细死因数据，进行了关于空气污染与自杀之间关系的首次大规模研究。使用风向作为日常污染暴露的工具变量，我们发现每日PM2.5每增加1 μg/m³，与每日自杀人数增加0.49%以及因自杀相关住院人数增加0.171例（增加50%）相关。使用两阶段最小二乘法的估计值更大且更稳健，表明测量误差导致了向零的偏误。事件研究估计进一步说明，当期的污染暴露比前几周的污染暴露更为重要。

30625.title: Marriage Matching over Five Centuries in China
30625.zh_title: 中国五个世纪以来的婚姻匹配
30625.abstract: In the marriage market, families make investments on behalf of their young so that they are able to form a household with their preferred partner. We analyze marriage markets in a central region of China between about 1300 and 1850 through the lens of a model of marriage matching and intergenerational transmission of inequality. For both female and male children, marriage patterns are far from being random, instead, there is positive assortative matching. This is present for the entire income distribution, though at the highest levels matching on income is thirty times of what it is at low income levels. Over the sample period the degree of matching falls, and more so for young females, although from a lower level than young males. Lower marriage matching in the 18th and 19th centuries is accompanied by lower inequality across households, yielding a positive time series correlation between sorting and inequality. There are also intergenerational matching returns. Children of parents who are strongly matched tend to be able to marry into relatively high-income in-law families, conditional on the incomes in both the father’s and the mother’s families. Matching in the parent generation pays off more strongly for male than for female children.
30625.zh_abstract: 在婚姻市场中，家庭代表其年轻子女进行投资，以便他们能够与偏好的伴侣组建家庭。我们通过一个婚姻匹配与不平等代际传递模型的视角，分析了约1300年至1850年间中国中部地区的婚姻市场。对于女性和男性子女而言，婚姻模式远非随机，而是存在正向选型匹配。这在全部收入分布中都存在，尽管在最高收入水平上，基于收入的匹配程度是低收入水平时的三十倍。在样本期间，匹配程度有所下降，年轻女性下降更多，尽管其起点低于年轻男性。18和19世纪较低的婚姻匹配伴随着家庭间较低的 inequality，从而产生了排序与 inequality 之间的正向时间序列相关性。还存在代际匹配回报。父母匹配程度高的子女，在控制了父亲和母亲家庭收入后，往往能够嫁入或娶入相对高收入的姻亲家庭。父母一代的匹配对男性子女的回报比对女性子女更强。
30625.meta: Programs：DAE, EFG, LS；JEL：J12, J16, N30, N45

30624.title: Legalizing Entrepreneurship
30624.authors: Dany Bahar, Bo Cowgill, Jorge Guzman
30624.abstract: We use administrative data linked to the complete formal business registry to study a 2018 policy shift in Colombia that made nearly half a million Venezuelan undocumented migrants eligible for a resident visa. Immigrants who receive the visa increase their economic activity in the form of higher entrepreneurship by a factor as high as 12, bringing it to parity with native Colombians four years later. To establish causal estimates, we develop a novel extension of a regression discontinuity design. Our design uses variation in the running-variable (coming from rain) to instrument for migrants’ choices to apply for visas.
30624.zh_abstract: 我们利用与完整正式商业登记相关联的行政数据，研究了哥伦比亚2018年的一项政策转变，该政策使近50万委内瑞拉无证移民有资格获得居留签证。获得签证的移民以创业形式开展的经济活动增加了高达12倍，四年后与哥伦比亚本土居民持平。为建立因果估计，我们开发了一种断点回归设计的新扩展。我们的设计利用运行变量（来自降雨）的变化作为工具变量，来影响移民申请签证的选择。

30623.title: National Wage Setting
30623.authors: Jonathon Hazell, Christina Patterson, Heather Sarsons, Bledi Taska
30623.abstract: How do firms set wages across space? Using job-level vacancy data and a survey of HR managers, we show that 40-50% of a job’s posted wages are identical across locations within a firm. Moreover, nominal posted wages within the firm vary relatively little with local prices, a pattern we verify with other measures of job level wages. Using the co-movement of wage growth across establishments, we argue these patterns reflect national wage setting---a significant minority of firms choose to set the same nominal wage for a job across all their establishments, despite varying local labor market conditions.
30623.zh_abstract: 企业如何在不同空间设定工资？利用职位级别的空缺数据和一项针对人力资源经理的调查，我们显示，在一个企业内部，40-50%的职位公布工资在不同地点是相同的。此外，企业内部的名义公布工资与当地价格水平的关联相对较小，我们通过其他职位级别工资指标验证了这一模式。利用不同机构间工资增长的共同变动，我们认为这些模式反映了全国性工资设定——相当一部分企业选择为其所有机构的同一职位设定相同的名义工资，尽管当地劳动力市场条件各不相同。

30622.title: The Effects of Combat Deployments on Veterans' Outcomes
30622.zh_title: 作战部署对退伍军人结果的影响
30622.authors: Jesse M. Bruhn, Kyle Greenberg, Matthew Gudgeon, Evan K. Rose, Yotam Shem-Tov
30622.abstract: As millions of soldiers deployed to Iraq or Afghanistan between 2001 and 2021, Veteran Affairs Disability Compensation payments quadrupled and the veteran suicide rate rose rapidly. We estimate causal effects of combat deployments on soldiers’ well-being. To eliminate non-random selection into deployment, we leverage quasi-random assignment of newly recruited soldiers to units on staggered deployment cycles. Deployments increase injuries, combat deaths, and disability compensation, but we find limited evidence that they affect suicide, deaths of despair, financial health, incarceration, or education. More dangerous deployments have similarly limited effects. Our estimates suggest that deployment cannot explain either the recent rise in disability payments, which is more likely driven by policy changes, or the surge in noncombat deaths, which is better explained by shifts in observable characteristics of soldiers.
30622.zh_abstract: 随着2001年至2021年间数百万士兵被部署到伊拉克或阿富汗，退伍军人事务部伤残补偿金支付额翻了两番，退伍军人自杀率也迅速上升。我们估计了作战部署对士兵福祉的因果效应。为消除非随机选择进入部署的影响，我们利用了新招募士兵准随机分配到不同部署周期轮换部队的情况。部署增加了受伤、战斗死亡和伤残补偿，但我们发现有限证据表明它影响自杀、绝望死亡、财务健康、监禁或教育。更危险的部署同样影响有限。我们的估计表明，部署既不能解释近期伤残补偿金的上升（这更可能由政策变化驱动），也不能解释非战斗死亡人数的激增（这更可能由士兵可观测特征的转变来解释）。

30621.title: Subjective Performance Evaluation, Influence Activities, and Bureaucratic Work Behavior: Evidence from China
30621.zh_title: 主观绩效评估、影响活动与官僚工作行为：来自中国的证据
30621.authors: Alain de Janvry, Guojun He, Elisabeth Sadoulet, Shaoda Wang, Qiong Zhang
30621.abstract: Subjective performance evaluation is widely used by firms and governments to provide work incentives. However, delegating evaluation power to local leadership could induce influence activities: employees might devote too much effort to impressing/pleasing their evaluator, relative to working toward the goals of the organization itself. We conduct a large-scale randomized field experiment among Chinese local civil servants to study the existence and implications of influence activities. We find that civil servants do engage in evaluator-specific influence to affect evaluation outcomes, partly in the form of reallocating work efforts toward job tasks that are more important and observable to the evaluator. Importantly, we show that introducing uncertainty about the evaluator’s identity discourages evaluator-specific influence activities and improves bureaucratic work performance.
30621.zh_abstract: 主观绩效评估被企业和政府广泛用于提供工作激励。然而，将评估权力下放给地方领导可能引发影响活动：员工可能投入过多精力去给评估者留下好印象或取悦评估者，而不是致力于实现组织自身的目标。我们在中国地方公务员中进行了一项大规模随机实地实验，以研究影响活动的存在及其影响。我们发现，公务员确实会进行针对评估者的影响活动以影响评估结果，部分形式是将工作努力重新分配到对评估者更重要且更可见的工作任务上。重要的是，我们表明，引入关于评估者身份的不确定性会抑制针对评估者的影响活动，并改善官僚工作绩效。

30620.title: Opening the Black Box: Task and Skill Mix and Productivity Dispersion
30620.zh_title: 打开黑箱：任务与技能组合及生产率离散度
30620.authors: G. Jacob Blackwood, Cindy Cunningham, Matthew Dey, Lucia S. Foster, Cheryl Grim, John C. Haltiwanger, Rachel L. Nesbit, Sabrina Wulff Pabilonia, Jay Stewart, Cody Tuttle, Zoltan Wolf
30620.abstract: An important gap in most empirical studies of establishment-level productivity is the limited information about workers’ characteristics and their tasks. Skill-adjusted labor input measures have been shown to be important for aggregate productivity measurement. Moreover, the theoretical literature on differences in production technologies across businesses increasingly emphasizes the task content of production. Our ultimate objective is to open this black box of tasks and skills at the establishment-level by combining establishment-level data on occupations from the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) with a restricted-access establishment-level productivity dataset created by the BLS-Census Bureau Collaborative Micro-productivity Project. We take a first step toward this objective by exploring the conceptual, specification, and measurement issues to be confronted. We provide suggestive empirical analysis of the relationship between within-industry dispersion in productivity and tasks and skills. We find that within-industry productivity dispersion is strongly positively related to within-industry task/skill dispersion.
30620.zh_abstract: 在大多数关于机构层面生产率的实证研究中，一个重要的空白是关于工人特征及其任务的有限信息。技能调整后的劳动投入指标已被证明对总体生产率测量很重要。此外，关于企业间生产技术差异的理论文献越来越强调生产的任务内容。我们的最终目标是通过将劳工统计局（BLS）的职业数据与BLS-人口普查局协作微观生产率项目创建的受限访问机构层面生产率数据集相结合，打开机构层面任务与技能的黑箱。我们通过探讨需要面对的概念、规范和测量问题，朝着这一目标迈出了第一步。我们提供了关于行业内生产率离散度与任务和技能之间关系的提示性实证分析。我们发现，行业内生产率离散度与行业内任务/技能离散度呈强正相关。

30619.title: An Optimal Mechanism to Fund the Development of Vaccines Against Emerging Epidemics
30619.zh_title: 资助针对新兴流行病疫苗开发的最优机制
30619.authors: Christopher M. Snyder, Kendall Hoyt, Dimitrios Gouglas
30619.abstract: We derive the optimal funding mechanism to incentivize development and production of vaccines against diseases with epidemic potential. In the model, suppliers' costs are private information and investments are noncontractible, precluding cost-reimbursement contracts, requiring fixed-price contracts conditioned on delivery of a successful product. The high failure risk for individual vaccines calls for incentivizing multiple entrants, accomplished by the optimal mechanism, a (w+1)-price reverse Vickrey auction with reserve. Our analysis determines the optimal number of entrants and required funding level. Based on a distribution of supplier costs estimated from survey data, we simulate the optimal mechanism's performance in scenarios ranging from a small outbreak, causing harm in the millions of dollars, to the Covid-19 pandemic, causing harm in the trillions. We assess which mechanism features contribute most to its optimality.
30619.zh_abstract: 我们推导出了激励针对具有流行潜力的疾病疫苗开发和生产的最优资助机制。在该模型中，供应商的成本是私人信息，且投资不可签约，这排除了成本补偿合同，需要采用以成功产品交付为条件的固定价格合同。单个疫苗的高失败风险要求激励多个进入者，这通过最优机制——一种带有保留价的（w+1）价格反向维克里拍卖——来实现。我们的分析确定了最优进入者数量和所需资助水平。基于从调查数据估计的供应商成本分布，我们模拟了该最优机制在从小型疫情（造成数百万美元损失）到新冠疫情（造成数万亿美元损失）等情景下的表现。我们评估了哪些机制特征对其最优性贡献最大。
30619.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, IO, LE, PR；JEL：D47, H44, I18, L65, O31

30618.title: The Impact of Large-Scale Social Media Advertising Campaigns on COVID-19 Vaccination: Evidence from Two Randomized Controlled Trials
30618.zh_title: 大规模社交媒体广告活动对COVID-19疫苗接种的影响：来自两项随机对照试验的证据
30618.authors: Lisa Y. Ho, Emily Breza, Marcella Alsan, Abhijit Banerjee, Arun G. Chandrasekhar, Fatima Cody Stanford, Renato Fior, Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Kelly Holland, Emily Hoppe, Louis-Maël Jean, Lucy Ogbu-Nwobodo, Benjamin A. Olken, Carlos Torres, Pierre-Luc Vautrey, Erica Warner, Esther Duflo
30618.abstract: COVID-19 vaccines are widely available in wealthy countries, yet many people remain unvaccinated. Understanding the effectiveness -- or lack thereof -- of popular vaccination campaign strategies is therefore critical. In this paper, we report results from two studies that tested strategies central to current vaccination outreach: (1) direct communication by health professionals addressing questions about vaccination and (2) efforts to motivate individuals to promote vaccination within their social networks. Near the peak of the Omicron wave, doctor- and nurse-produced videos were disseminated to 17.8 million Facebook users in the US and 11.5 million in France. In both countries, we cannot reject the null of no effect of any of the interventions on any of the outcome variables (first doses - US and France, second doses and boosters - US). We can reject very small effects on first doses during the interventions in both countries (0.16pp - US, 0.021pp - France). In contrast with similar campaigns earlier in the pandemic to encourage health-preserving behaviors, messaging at this stage of the pandemic -- whether aimed at the unvaccinated or those tasked with encouraging others -- did not change vaccination decisions.
30618.zh_abstract: COVID-19疫苗在富裕国家广泛可得，但许多人仍未接种疫苗。因此，理解流行疫苗接种运动策略的有效性（或无效性）至关重要。在本文中，我们报告了两项研究的结果，这些研究测试了当前疫苗接种推广的核心策略：（1）卫生专业人员直接沟通解答疫苗接种问题，以及（2）激励个人在其社交网络中推广疫苗接种的努力。在奥密克戎疫情高峰附近，由医生和护士制作的视频被分发给美国1780万和法国1150万Facebook用户。在这两个国家，我们无法拒绝所有干预措施对所有结果变量（第一剂次——美国和法国，第二剂次和加强针——美国）均无影响的零假设。在干预期间，我们可以拒绝两个国家第一剂次非常小的影响（美国0.16个百分点，法国0.021个百分点）。与疫情早期鼓励健康保护行为的类似活动相比，在疫情这一阶段的宣传——无论是针对未接种者还是负责鼓励他人者——并未改变疫苗接种决策。
30618.meta: Programs：DEV, EH, LS, PE；JEL：C93, D83, I12, L86, O33

30617.title: The Economics of Women's Rights
30617.authors: Michèle Tertilt, Matthias Doepke, Anne Hannusch, Laura Montenbruck
30617.abstract: Two centuries ago, in most countries around the world, women were unable to vote, had no say over their own children or property, and could not obtain a divorce. Women have gradually gained rights in many areas of life, and this legal expansion has been closely intertwined with economic development. We aim to understand the drivers behind these reforms. To this end, we distinguish between four types of women’s rights—economic, political, labor, and body—and document their evolution over the past 50 years across countries. We summarize the political-economy mechanisms that link economic development to changes in women's rights and show empirically that these mechanisms account for a large share of the variation in women's rights across countries and over time.
30617.zh_abstract: 两个世纪前，在世界上大多数国家，女性无法投票，对自己的孩子或财产没有发言权，也不能离婚。女性在生活的许多领域逐渐获得了权利，这种法律扩展与经济发展紧密交织。我们旨在理解这些改革背后的驱动因素。为此，我们区分了四种类型的女性权利——经济权利、政治权利、劳动权利和身体权利——并记录了它们在过去50年间各国的发展演变。我们总结了将经济发展与女性权利变化联系起来的政治经济学机制，并实证表明这些机制解释了各国之间以及随时间推移女性权利变化的很大一部分。
30617.meta: Programs：EFG, POL；JEL：D13, D72, J12, J16, N3, N40, O10, P0

30616.title: Improving Household Debt Management with Robo-Advice
30616.zh_title: 利用机器人咨询改善家庭债务管理
30616.authors: Ida Chak, Karen Croxson, Francesco D’Acunto, Jonathan Reuter, Alberto G. Rossi, Jonathan M. Shaw
30616.abstract: Poor debt-management skills lower financial security and wealth accumulation. Because optimal solutions to credit repayment problems depend on neither risk preferences nor beliefs, loan repayment is a prime application for robo-advising. Vulnerable households, though, tend to distrust new technologies and override suggestions that do not align with ingrained heuristics, such as matching the minimum payment on a credit card balance. Lower adoption rates by these groups might increase rather than reduce wealth inequalities. To assess these trade-offs, we design and implement an RCT in which robo-advice for borrower repayment decisions is offered to a set of representative UK consumers. The availability of free robo-advice significantly improves average loan repayment choices. When their willingness to pay is elicited, many subjects report values larger than the monetary benefits of the tool, perhaps due to lower cognitive and psychological costs decision-makers face when making assisted choices. Non-adopters and overriders report lower trust in algorithms at the end of the experiment. We find no evidence of learning from robo-advice, which barely improves subsequent unassisted choices, even when paired with explicit tips. In fact, robo-advice usage crowds out learning-by-doing, which is highest for those who make all choices unassisted.
30616.zh_abstract: 糟糕的债务管理技能会降低财务安全并阻碍财富积累。由于信贷偿还问题的最优解既不依赖于风险偏好也不依赖于信念，贷款偿还成为机器人咨询的一个主要应用领域。然而，弱势家庭往往不信任新技术，并会推翻那些与根深蒂固的启发式方法（例如匹配信用卡余额的最低还款额）不一致的建议。这些群体较低的采纳率可能会加剧而非缩小财富不平等。为了评估这些权衡，我们设计并实施了一项随机对照试验，向一组具有代表性的英国消费者提供关于借款人还款决策的机器人咨询。免费机器人咨询的提供显著改善了平均贷款偿还选择。当被问及支付意愿时，许多受试者报告的价值高于该工具带来的货币收益，这可能是由于决策者在获得辅助选择时面临的认知和心理成本较低。在实验结束时，未采纳者和推翻建议者报告了对算法较低的信任度。我们没有发现从机器人咨询中学习的证据，即使与明确的提示相结合，机器人咨询也几乎未能改善后续的独立选择。事实上，机器人咨询的使用挤出了“干中学”，而“干中学”的效果在那些完全独立做出所有选择的人中最高。

30615.title: The Effect of Performance Pay Incentives on Market Frictions: Evidence from Medicare
30615.zh_title: 绩效薪酬激励对市场摩擦的影响：来自医疗保险的证据
30615.authors: Atul Gupta, Guy David, Lucy (Kunhee) Kim
30615.abstract: Medicare has increased the use of performance pay incentives for hospitals, with the goal of increasing care coordination across providers, reducing market frictions, and ultimately to improve quality of care. This paper provides new empirical evidence by using novel operations and claims data from a large, independent home health care firm with the Hospital Readmissions Reduction Program (HRRP) penalty on hospitals providing identifying variation. We find that the penalty incentive to reduce re-hospitalizations passed through from hospitals to the firm at least for some types of patients, since it provided more care inputs for heart disease patients discharged from hospitals at greater penalty risk and that contributed more patients to the firm. This evidence suggests that HRRP helped increase coordination between hospitals and home health firms without formal integration. Greater home health effort does not appear to have led to lower patient readmissions.
30615.zh_abstract: 医疗保险增加了对医院的绩效薪酬激励的使用，旨在提高跨提供者的护理协调，减少市场摩擦，并最终改善护理质量。本文利用一家大型独立家庭医疗保健公司的新颖运营和索赔数据，以及针对医院的医院再入院减少计划（HRRP）罚款作为识别变异，提供了新的实证证据。我们发现，减少再住院的罚款激励至少对某些类型的患者从医院传递到了该公司，因为该公司为从面临更高罚款风险的医院出院的、且为该公司贡献了更多患者的心脏病患者提供了更多的护理投入。这一证据表明，HRRP有助于在没有正式整合的情况下增加医院与家庭医疗公司之间的协调。更大的家庭医疗努力似乎并未导致患者再入院率的降低。

30650.title: Trade and Selection with Heterogeneous Firms and Perfect Competition
30650.zh_title: 异质性企业与完全竞争下的贸易与选择
30650.authors: Xue Bai, Arpita Chatterjee, Kala Krishna, Hong Ma
30650.abstract: This paper develops a new model with heterogeneous firms under perfect competition in a Heckscher-Ohlin-Samuelson setting. We show that trade need not make selection in the comparative advantage sector stricter as suggested by earlier work. Selection is driven by the capital intensity in entry costs relative to production costs. If trade raises (reduces) the wage rental ratio, and entry costs are more labor intensive than production costs in a sector, then the ratio of entry cost to production costs will rise (fall) and selection will become weaker (stricter) in this sector. Moreover, we show that the central theorems of the HOS model (as well as the standard generalizations using duality) carry over in our setting.
30650.zh_abstract: 本文在赫克歇尔-俄林-萨缪尔森框架下，发展了一个完全竞争下异质性企业的新模型。我们表明，贸易并不一定像早期研究所示的那样使比较优势部门的选择更严格。选择由进入成本相对于生产成本的资本密集度驱动。如果贸易提高（降低）工资-租金比率，并且在一个部门中进入成本比生产成本更劳动密集，那么进入成本与生产成本的比率将上升（下降），该部门的选择将变得更弱（更严格）。此外，我们表明，HOS模型的中心定理（以及使用对偶性的标准推广）在我们的设定中得以延续。

30649.title: The Economics of Carbon Accounting and Carbon Offsets
30649.zh_title: 碳核算与碳抵消的经济学
30649.abstract: I provide a rigorous framework for accounting for corporate greenhouse gas emissions, based on the Greenhouse Gas Protocol. I show that only Scope 1 emissions are of interest from a national policy perspective: that emissions in Scopes 2 and 3 are duplicative, and that downstream Scope 3 emissions in total are equal to total Scope 1 emissions. The correct measure of a company's contributions to national GHG emissions is its Scope 1 emissions plus a part of the emissions of the household and government sectors. This is not generally the same as the level of emissions for which a company bears some responsibility, legal or otherwise. I apply some of these ideas to an analysis of carbon offsets, trying to understand the conditions under which offsets are a valid mechanism for reducing emissions by formalizing the ideas of additionality and leakage.
30649.zh_abstract: 我基于温室气体核算体系，为企业温室气体排放核算提供了一个严谨的框架。我表明，从国家政策角度来看，只有范围1的排放才具有意义：范围2和范围3的排放是重复计算的，并且下游范围3的排放总量等于范围1的排放总量。衡量一家公司对国家温室气体排放贡献的正确指标是其范围1的排放量加上家庭和政府部门的排放量的一部分。这通常不等于该公司在法律或其他方面承担某种责任的排放水平。我将其中一些想法应用于碳抵消的分析，试图通过形式化额外性和泄漏的概念，来理解碳抵消成为减少排放的有效机制的条件。

30648.title: Valuing Deaths Caused by Climate Change
30648.zh_title: 评估气候变化导致的死亡价值
30648.abstract: Valuing deaths caused by climate change is complex, controversial, and of first-order consequence for the social cost of carbon (SCC): the metric used to account for climate impacts in Benefit Cost Analysis (BCA). Yet the underlying considerations remain under-analyzed. We assess three BCA approaches with support in the literature and practice when applied to global externalities like climate change: (1) Kaldor-Hicks, (2) Current U.S. Practice, and (3) Welfare-Weighted. All approaches share descriptive inputs including value of statistical life—the willingness to pay to avoid elevated mortality risk—but differ in their procedure for aggregating benefits and costs across winners and losers, a normative choice that must encode value judgements. (1) values richer statistical lives more than poorer lives, (2) values lives equally, and (3) values lives nearly or exactly equally depending on parameter values. We find that the rationale for (1) is weaker for global externalities than domestic ones. Because compensation to losers is less likely globally, (1) reduces to a social welfare function with Negishi weights that undo diminishing marginal utility. Furthermore, when climate costs are measured in purchasing-power-parity-adjusted money—as is typical for the SCC—(1) no longer satisfies its own potential compensation criterion. Arguments for (2) and (3) are comparatively stronger for global externalities than domestic ones, and we establish conditions under which they converge. Given these complexities, we emphasize the importance of reporting the mortality impacts implicit in the SCC in natural physical units before monetizing and aggregating, so that normative assumptions are explicit and transparent, as is standard for other impact categories in BCA. This physical-unit metric implicit in every SCC value is the mortality cost of carbon (MCC): the number of deaths per pulse of emissions.
30648.zh_abstract: 评估气候变化导致的死亡价值是复杂且有争议的，并且对碳的社会成本（SCC）具有首要影响：碳的社会成本是用于在成本效益分析（BCA）中核算气候影响的指标。然而，其背后的考量因素仍未得到充分分析。我们评估了在文献和实践中得到支持的三种成本效益分析方法，当应用于气候变化等全球外部性时：（1）卡尔多-希克斯方法，（2）当前美国实践方法，以及（3）福利加权方法。所有方法都共享描述性输入，包括统计生命价值——即避免死亡风险增加的支付意愿——但在如何汇总赢家和输家之间的收益和成本这一程序上有所不同，这是一个必须编码价值判断的规范性选择。（1）方法对更富裕的统计生命估值高于更贫穷的生命，（2）方法对所有生命平等估值，（3）方法根据参数值对生命进行近乎或完全平等的估值。我们发现，对于全球外部性而言，（1）方法的理由比国内外部性更弱。由于在全球范围内对输家进行补偿的可能性较小，（1）方法简化为一个带有内吉希权重的社会福利函数，该权重抵消了边际效用递减。此外，当气候成本以购买力平价调整后的货币衡量时——正如碳的社会成本通常所做的那样——（1）方法不再满足其自身的潜在补偿标准。对于全球外部性而言，（2）和（3）方法的论据相对比国内外部性更强，并且我们建立了它们趋同的条件。鉴于这些复杂性，我们强调在货币化和汇总之前，以自然物理单位报告碳的社会成本中隐含的死亡率影响的重要性，这样规范性假设就明确且透明，正如成本效益分析中其他影响类别的标准做法一样。每个碳的社会成本值中隐含的这个物理单位指标就是碳的死亡率成本（MCC）：每单位排放脉冲导致的死亡人数。

30647.title: The Effect of the COVID-19 Pandemic Recession on Less Educated Women's Human Capital: Some Projections
30647.zh_title: 新冠疫情大流行衰退对受教育程度较低女性人力资本的影响：一些预测
30647.authors: Mark M. Drozd, Robert A. Moffitt, Xinyu Zhao
30647.abstract: The recession induced by the COVID-19 pandemic resulted in major declines in employment of women, both from the demand side as firms reduced employment and from the supply side resulting from school closures and the closing of many child care facilities. We provide projections of possible impacts of this reduction on less-educated women’s future human capital framed within the traditional Mincerian model that implies that wage growth falls if a recession reduces the growth of work experience. We develop a new and modified form of the Mincerian log wage equation which we argue captures the effect of women’s work experience on their human capital in a way superior to the traditional form of that equation. Using that modified form, we estimate the impact of recession-induced loss of work experience on wages. Our model, estimated on pre-COVID data, incorporates special features anticipated to be of importance in the pandemic, including the degree to which negative aggregate shocks occur to pandemic-specific industries, whether the impact of shocks varies by telecommuting occupation, and how the impact varies with the presence of preschool and school-age children who are affected by school and child-care facility closures. We find that wage losses one year out from 2020 are relatively modest on average, generally less than one percent, with the largest for married women without children in the home. But losses are greater for married women at young ages, mothers with very young children, and for those working in COVID-impacted industries. School and child care closures increase projected negative wage impacts for married mothers by an additional 50 percent.
30647.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情大流行引发的衰退导致女性就业大幅下降，这既来自需求侧（企业减少就业），也来自供给侧（学校关闭和许多儿童保育设施关闭）。我们提供了这种减少对受教育程度较低女性未来人力资本可能影响的预测，这些预测基于传统的明瑟模型，该模型暗示如果经济衰退减少了工作经验的增长，工资增长就会下降。我们开发了一种新的、修正形式的明瑟对数工资方程，我们认为它比该方程的传统形式更好地捕捉了女性工作经验对其人力资本的影响。使用这种修正形式，我们估计了衰退导致的工作经验损失对工资的影响。我们的模型基于新冠疫情前的数据估计，纳入了预期在疫情中重要的特殊特征，包括负面总体冲击对疫情特定行业的冲击程度，冲击的影响是否因远程办公职业而异，以及冲击的影响如何因受学校和儿童保育设施关闭影响的学龄前和学龄儿童的存在而变化。我们发现，从2020年开始一年后的工资损失平均而言相对较小，通常低于1%，其中对家中无子女的已婚女性影响最大。但对于年轻已婚女性、有非常年幼子女的母亲以及在受疫情影响的行业工作的女性来说，损失更大。学校和儿童保育设施的关闭使已婚母亲的预计负面工资影响额外增加了50%。

30646.title: Racial and Ethnic Inequality and the China Shock
30646.zh_title: 种族与民族不平等以及中国冲击
30646.authors: Lisa B. Kahn, Lindsay Oldenski, Geunyong Park
30646.abstract: Minority workers tend to be disproportionately harmed by negative economic shocks. Indeed, we show that Hispanic populations experienced worse employment losses due to import competition from China, relative to whites, largely due to lower education levels. In contrast, Black-white employment and wage gaps actually narrowed due to relative growth in non-manufacturing sectors. We show that Black workers were less attached to manufacturing by 2000, compared to whites, and were therefore more poised to take advantage of China shock induced reallocation to services. The lasting negative impacts of the China shock on exposed communities were primarily driven by white workers.
30646.zh_abstract: 少数族裔工人往往不成比例地受到负面经济冲击的伤害。事实上，我们表明，相对于白人，西班牙裔人口因来自中国的进口竞争而遭受了更严重的就业损失，这主要是由于教育水平较低。相比之下，由于非制造业部门的相对增长，黑人与白人之间的就业和工资差距实际上缩小了。我们表明，与白人相比，到2000年，黑人工人对制造业的依附程度较低，因此更有能力利用中国冲击引发的向服务业重新配置。中国冲击对受影响社区的持久负面影响主要由白人工人驱动。

30645.title: Communicating Social Security Reform
30645.authors: Andrew Caplin, Eungik Lee, Søren Leth-Petersen, Johan Sæverud
30645.abstract: Despite its centrality in monetary policy, communication is not a focus in social security reform. We investigate the potential for active communication to dissipate apparently widespread public confusion about the future of social security. We implement a simple information treatment in which we randomly provide survey respondents access to the longevity-based eligibility age implemented by reform that Denmark launched in 2006. Absent treatment, younger workers not only have biased beliefs, expecting to become eligible for social security earlier than policy makers intend, but also are highly uncertain about eligibility age. The information treatment eliminates the bias, suggesting it results from misunderstanding. Yet it has no influence on uncertainty, suggesting this is driven by unavoidable demographic and political uncertainties. Our results highlight the value of communication strategies and belief measurement as policy instruments outside the monetary policy arena.
30645.zh_abstract: 尽管沟通在货币政策中处于核心地位，但它并非社会保障改革的焦点。我们研究了积极沟通是否有潜力消除公众对社会保障未来显然普遍存在的困惑。我们实施了一个简单的信息处理实验，其中我们随机向调查受访者提供丹麦在2006年启动的改革所实施的基于寿命的资格年龄。在没有处理的情况下，年轻工人不仅存在有偏见的信念，期望比政策制定者意图更早地获得社会保障资格，而且对资格年龄高度不确定。信息处理消除了这种偏见，表明它源于误解。然而，它对不确定性没有影响，表明这是由不可避免的人口和政治不确定性驱动的。我们的结果突显了沟通策略和信念测量作为货币政策领域之外政策工具的价值。

30644.title: From Lapdogs to Watchdogs: Random Auditor Assignment and Municipal Fiscal Performance
30644.zh_title: 从哈巴狗到看门狗：随机审计师分配与市政财政绩效
30644.abstract: A central challenge in public finance is how to design oversight institutions that align local governments’ incentives with national fiscal objectives. While monitoring can mitigate agency problems, it may itself be rendered ineffective if monitors are corruptible. In this paper, I evaluate the consequences of changes in the design of monitoring institutions for organizational performance. I exploit the staggered introduction of a reform that removed the control of municipal auditors’ appointments from local politicians and introduced a random assignment mechanism. I obtain four main findings. First, random matching severs auditors-mayors connections. Second, treated municipalities significantly and persistently improve their net surpluses and debt repayments, in line with national government objectives. Third, the fiscal improvement results from a sizeable increase in tax capacity. Fourth, treatment effects are significantly larger where the risk of auditor capture was highest before the reform, but also increasing in auditors’ expertise—suggesting the potential presence of a bias-information trade-off. Overall, the results highlight the value of monitors’ independence and illustrate how changes in organizational design can substantially improve governance.
30644.zh_abstract: 公共财政中的一个核心挑战是如何设计监督机构，使地方政府的激励与国家财政目标保持一致。虽然监督可以缓解代理问题，但如果监督者本身可能被腐蚀，监督本身可能变得无效。在本文中，我评估了监督机构设计变化对组织绩效的影响。我利用了一项改革的交错引入，该改革取消了地方政治家对市政审计师任命的控制，并引入了随机分配机制。我获得了四个主要发现。首先，随机匹配切断了审计师与市长的联系。其次，受处理的城市显著且持续地改善了其净盈余和债务偿还，符合国家政府的目标。第三，财政改善源于税收能力的大幅提升。第四，在改革前审计师被俘获风险最高的地方，处理效应显著更大，但也随着审计师专业知识的增加而增加——这表明可能存在偏见-信息权衡。总体而言，结果突显了监督者独立性的价值，并说明了组织设计的变化如何能够显著改善治理。
30644.meta: Programs：CF, DEV, LE, PE, POL；JEL：D73, H11, H71, H72, H77, H81, H83, M42

30643.title: Do Pandemics Change Healthcare? Evidence from the Great Influenza
30643.zh_title: 大流行病会改变医疗保健吗？来自大流感的证据
30643.authors: Rui Esteves, Kris James Mitchener, Peter Nencka, Melissa A. Thomasson
30643.abstract: Using newly digitized U.S. city-level data on hospitals, we explore how pandemics alter preferences for healthcare. We find that cities with higher levels of mortality during the Great Influenza of 1918-1919 subsequently expanded hospital capacity by more than cities experiencing less influenza mortality: cities in the top half of the mortality distribution increased their count of hospitals by 8-10 percent in the years after the pandemic. This effect persisted to 1960 and was driven by increases in non-governmental hospitals. Growth responded most in richer cities, exacerbating existing inequalities in access to healthcare. We do not find evidence that government-run hospitals or other types of city-level spending related to healthcare responded to pandemic intensity, suggesting that large health shocks do not necessarily lead to increased public provision of health services.
30643.zh_abstract: 利用新数字化的美国城市级医院数据，我们探讨了大流行病如何改变对医疗保健的偏好。我们发现，在1918-1919年大流感期间死亡率较高的城市，随后比经历流感死亡率较低的城市更大幅度地扩大了医院容量：死亡率分布上半部分的城市在大流行后的几年里，其医院数量增加了8-10%。这种影响持续到1960年，并且是由非政府医院的增加驱动的。增长在较富裕的城市中反应最大，加剧了在医疗保健获取方面现有的不平等。我们没有发现证据表明政府运营的医院或与医疗保健相关的其他类型的城市级支出对大流行强度做出了反应，这表明大规模的健康冲击并不一定会导致公共医疗服务提供的增加。

30642.title: Shared Models in Networks, Organizations, and Groups
30642.zh_title: 网络、组织和群体中的共享模型
30642.abstract: To understand new information, we exchange models or interpretations with others. This paper provides a framework for thinking about such social exchanges of models. The key assumption is that people adopt the interpretation in their network that best explains the data, given their prior beliefs. An implication is that interpretations evolve within a network. For many network structures, social learning mutes reactions to data: the exchange of models leaves beliefs closer to priors than they were before. Our results shed light on why disagreements persist as new information arrives, as well as the goal and structure of meetings in organizations.
30642.zh_abstract: 为了理解新信息，我们与他人交换模型或解释。本文提供了一个思考这种模型社会交换的框架。关键假设是，人们采用其网络中能够最好地解释数据的解释，基于他们先前的信念。一个含义是，解释在网络内部演变。对于许多网络结构，社会学习会抑制对数据的反应：模型的交换使信念比之前更接近先验。我们的结果揭示了为什么随着新信息的到来，分歧会持续存在，以及组织中会议的目标和结构。

30641.title: Bank Risk and Stockholding (1910-1934)
30641.abstract: The massive rise in U.S. stockholding during the early twentieth century resulted in the deepening of securities markets, the spread of investment banks, and the expansion of publicly held corporations. This paper makes use of a unique panel database of South Dakota bank stockholders from 1910-1934 to study bank stockholder growth as well as its effect on bank composition and risk. Overall, the average number of stockholders in a bank rose from 8 to 21 over the period with much of the rise occurring after 1924, but many banks remained highly concentrated. The new stockholders are associated with a subsequent increase in a bank’s proportion of loans-to-assets, but no direct effect on bank closure outside of this balance sheet effect. The data thus illustrate the start of a movement towards more diffuse bank stockholding and its potential consequences for the industry.
30641.zh_abstract: 20世纪初美国持股规模的急剧增长导致了证券市场的深化、投资银行的扩张以及公众持股公司的扩展。本文利用1910年至1934年南达科他州银行股东的面板数据，研究银行股东增长及其对银行构成和风险的影响。总体而言，在此期间，银行平均股东数量从8人增加到21人，大部分增长发生在1924年之后，但许多银行仍然高度集中。新股东与银行随后贷款资产比例的增加相关，但除了这种资产负债表效应外，对银行倒闭没有直接影响。因此，这些数据说明了银行持股向更分散方向发展的趋势及其对该行业的潜在影响。

30640.title: How Has COVID-19 Impacted Disability Employment?
30640.abstract: While the COVID-19 public health emergency has had disastrous health impacts for people with disabilities, it remains unclear what impact the associated economic recession and subsequent recovery have had on disability employment. Objective: We evaluated employment trends for people with and without disabilities over the course of the COVID-19 recession and subsequent economic recovery, both overall and by occupational category (essential, non-essential, teleworkable, non-teleworkable, frontline, nonfrontline). We made use of data from the nationally representative Current Population Survey. Linear probability models were used to estimate percent changes in employment-to-population ratios and identify differences between disabled and non-disabled employment in each quarter broadly and within specific occupational categories. As the COVID-19 recession began in Q2 2020, people with disabilities experienced employment losses that were proportionately similar to those experienced by people without disabilities. However, during the subsequent economic recovery, the employment rate of people with disabilities has grown more quickly in Q4 2021 through Q2 2022, driven by increased labor force participation. These employment gains have been concentrated in teleworkable, essential, and non- frontline occupations. Our findings suggest that people with disabilities are disproportionately benefiting from the rapid recovery from the initial economic contraction at the start of the pandemic.
30640.zh_abstract: 尽管COVID-19公共卫生紧急事件对残疾人造成了灾难性的健康影响，但相关的经济衰退及随后的复苏对残疾人就业的影响仍不清楚。目标：我们评估了在COVID-19衰退及随后的经济复苏期间，残疾人和非残疾人的就业趋势，包括总体情况以及按职业类别（必要、非必要、可远程办公、不可远程办公、一线、非一线）划分的情况。我们使用了具有全国代表性的当前人口调查数据。采用线性概率模型估计就业人口比率的变化百分比，并识别每个季度以及特定职业类别中残疾人与非残疾人就业的差异。随着COVID-19衰退在2020年第二季度开始，残疾人经历的就业损失比例与非残疾人相似。然而，在随后的经济复苏中，从2021年第四季度到2022年第二季度，由于劳动力参与率提高，残疾人的就业率增长更快。这些就业增长集中在可远程办公、必要和非一线职业。我们的研究结果表明，残疾人从疫情初期经济收缩后的快速复苏中获得了不成比例的收益。

30638.title: A New Test for Market Efficiency and Uncovered Interest Parity
30638.zh_title: 市场效率与未抛补利率平价的新检验
30638.authors: Richard T. Baillie, Francis X. Diebold, George Kapetanios, Kun Ho Kim
30638.abstract: We suggest a new single-equation test for Uncovered Interest Parity (UIP) based on a dynamic regression approach. The method provides consistent and asymptotically efficient parameter estimates, and is not dependent on assumptions of strict exogeneity. This new approach is asymptotically more efficient than the common approach of using OLS with HAC robust standard errors in the static forward premium regression. The coefficient estimates when spot return changes are regressed on the forward premium are all positive and remarkably stable across currencies. These estimates are considerably larger than those of previous studies, which frequently find negative coefficients. The method also has the advantage of showing dynamic effects of risk premia, or other events that may lead to rejection of UIP or the efficient markets hypothesis.
30638.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种基于动态回归方法的未抛补利率平价（UIP）新单方程检验。该方法提供了一致且渐近有效的参数估计，并且不依赖于严格外生性假设。与在静态远期溢价回归中使用带有HAC稳健标准误的普通最小二乘法（OLS）的常见方法相比，这种新方法渐近更有效。当即期收益率变化对远期溢价进行回归时，系数估计值均为正，且在不同货币间异常稳定。这些估计值远大于先前研究的结果，先前研究经常发现负系数。该方法还具有显示风险溢价动态效应或其他可能导致拒绝UIP或有效市场假说的事件的优势。

30637.title: Firm Sorting and Spatial Inequality
30637.zh_title: 企业分类与空间不平等
30637.authors: Ilse Lindenlaub, Ryungha Oh, Michael Peters
30637.abstract: We study the importance of spatial firm sorting for inequality both between and within local labor markets. We develop a novel model of spatial firm sorting, in which heterogeneous firms first choose a location and then hire workers in a frictional local labor market. Firms’ location choices are guided by a fundamental trade-off: Operating in productive locations increases output per worker, but sharing a labor market with other productive firms makes it hard to poach and retain workers, and hence limits firm size. We provide conditions under which there is positive firm sorting, with more productive firms settling in more productive locations. We show that positive firm sorting increases both the mean and the dispersion of wages in productive markets relative to less productive ones. The main mechanism is that firm sorting steepens the job ladder in productive places. We estimate our model using administrative data from Germany and identify firm sorting from a novel fact: Average local labor shares are lower in productive locations, which indicates a higher concentration of top firms with strong monopsony power. We infer that there is positive sorting of firms across space. Quantitatively, firm sorting can account for at least 16% of the spatial variation in mean wages and at least 38% of the variation in within-location wage dispersion.
30637.zh_abstract: 我们研究了空间企业分类对地方劳动力市场之间和内部不平等的重要性。我们开发了一个新颖的空间企业分类模型，其中异质性企业首先选择地点，然后在有摩擦的地方劳动力市场中雇佣工人。企业的选址决策受到一个基本权衡的指导：在生产率高的地点运营会增加人均产出，但与其他生产率高的企业共享劳动力市场会使得挖角和留住工人变得困难，从而限制了企业规模。我们提供了存在正向企业分类的条件，即生产率更高的企业定居在生产率更高的地点。我们表明，与生产率较低的市场相比，正向企业分类提高了生产率市场中工资的平均值和离散度。主要机制是，企业分类使生产率较高地区的职业阶梯更加陡峭。我们使用德国行政数据估计了模型，并通过一个新事实识别了企业分类：生产率较高地区的平均地方劳动份额较低，这表明具有强大垄断势力的顶级企业集中度更高。我们推断存在企业跨空间的正向分类。定量分析表明，企业分类可以解释至少16%的工资空间变异和至少38%的地点内部工资离散度变异。
30637.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI, LS；JEL：E20, E23, E24, E25, J30, J61, J63

30636.title: A New Racial Disparity in Traffic Fatalities
30636.zh_title: 交通死亡事故中的新种族差异
30636.abstract: In 2015, for the first time in nearly forty years, the rate of motor vehicle fatalities for Black Americans exceeded that of white Americans. By 2020, the gap in death rates stood at 34%, accounting for approximately 4,000 excess deaths between 2014 and 2020. This disproportionate increase occurred in nearly all states, in rural as well as urban areas, and was shared by drivers of all ages and genders. We consider a variety of potential explanations for the emerging race gap including race-specific changes in time spent driving, the circumstances of driving, the quality of medical care for crash victims, decreases in other types of mortality, changes in policing, and risky driving behaviors such as speeding, driving without a seat belt and driving while intoxicated. We can rule out many of these factors as important contributors to the race gap, but find evidence for two of them. The first is opportunity: Relative to white Americans, Black Americans are spending more time in vehicles than they have in the past. Changes in time spent driving, while modest, likely explain an important share of the emergent race gap. The second is a relative increase in drug use, manifested by a quadrupling of the rate of overdose deaths among Black Americans after 2014. Increased drug use appears to have resulted in a concomitant increase in fatal crashes involving drivers under the influence of drugs. Finally, we consider whether the emerging race gap is explained by the so-called "Ferguson effect," the idea that police officers have pulled back from enforcement activity in recent years. On the one hand, traffic stops made by police officers do appear to have declined after 2014. However, the decline in traffic stops does not appear to be race-specific and there is little evidence of a broad increase in risky driving behaviors like speeding and driving without a seat belt.
30636.zh_abstract: 2015年，近四十年来首次，美国黑人的机动车死亡率超过了白人。到2020年，死亡率差距达到34%，在2014年至2020年间造成了约4000例超额死亡。这种不成比例的增长几乎发生在所有州，包括农村和城市地区，并且所有年龄和性别的驾驶员都受到影响。我们考虑了新兴种族差距的各种潜在解释，包括种族特定的驾驶时间变化、驾驶环境、事故受害者医疗质量、其他类型死亡率的下降、警务变化以及危险驾驶行为（如超速、不系安全带和酒后驾驶）。我们可以排除许多这些因素作为种族差距的重要贡献者，但找到了其中两个因素的证据。第一个是机会：相对于美国白人，美国黑人在车辆上花费的时间比过去更多。驾驶时间的变化虽然不大，但可能解释了新兴种族差距的重要部分。第二个是药物使用的相对增加，表现为2014年后美国黑人药物过量死亡率翻了两番。药物使用的增加似乎导致了涉及药物影响下驾驶员的致命车祸相应增加。最后，我们考虑了新兴种族差距是否由所谓的“弗格森效应”解释，即近年来警察减少了执法活动。一方面，警察进行的交通拦截在2014年后确实有所下降。然而，交通拦截的下降似乎并非种族特定，并且几乎没有证据表明超速和不系安全带等危险驾驶行为普遍增加。

30635.title: Deferred Acceptance with News Utility
30635.zh_title: 具有新闻效用的延迟接受算法
30635.authors: Bnaya Dreyfuss, Ofer Glicksohn, Ori Heffetz, Assaf Romm
30635.abstract: Can incorporating expectations-based-reference-dependence (EBRD) considerations reduce seemingly dominated choices in the Deferred Acceptance (DA) mechanism? We run two experiments (total N = 500) where participants are randomly assigned into one of four DA variants—{static, dynamic} × {student proposing, student receiving}—and play ten simulated large-market school-assignment problems. While a standard, reference-independent model predicts the same straightforward behavior across all problems and variants, a news-utility EBRD model predicts stark differences across variants and problems. As the EBRD model predicts, we find that (i) across variants, dynamic student receiving leads to significantly fewer deviations from straightforward behavior, (ii) across problems, deviations increase with competitiveness, and (iii) within specific problems, the specific deviations predicted by the EBRD model are indeed those commonly observed in the data.
30635.zh_abstract: 纳入基于期望的参照依赖（EBRD）考虑能否减少延迟接受（DA）机制中看似被支配的选择？我们进行了两项实验（总样本量N=500），参与者被随机分配到四种DA变体之一——{静态，动态} × {学生提议，学生接收}——并参与十个模拟的大市场学校分配问题。虽然标准的、参照独立的模型预测所有问题和变体中的行为相同且直接，但新闻效用EBRD模型预测了不同变体和问题之间的显著差异。正如EBRD模型所预测的，我们发现：（i）在不同变体中，动态学生接收导致偏离直接行为的次数显著减少；（ii）在不同问题中，偏离随着竞争程度的增加而增加；（iii）在特定问题中，EBRD模型预测的具体偏离确实是在数据中常见观察到的那些。

30681.title: International Climate Agreements and the Scream of Greta
30681.zh_title: 国际气候协议与格蕾塔的呐喊
30681.abstract: Current policies directed at mitigating global warming appear unlikely to prevent temperatures from rising to levels that would trigger a precipitous increase in the costs of climate change. Various attempts at international cooperation to avoid this outcome have failed. Why is this problem so intractable? Can we expect an 11th-hour solution? Will some countries, or even all, succumb on the equilibrium path? We address these questions through a model that features the possibility of climate catastrophe and emphasizes the role of international externalities that a country’s policies exert on other countries and intertemporal externalities that current generations exert on future generations. Within this setting, we explore the extent to which international agreements can mitigate the problem of climate change. Our analysis illuminates the role that international climate agreements can be expected to play in addressing climate change, and it points to important limitations on what such agreements can achieve, even under the best of circumstances.
30681.zh_abstract: 当前旨在减缓全球变暖的政策似乎不太可能阻止气温上升到会引发气候变化成本急剧增加的水平。为避免这一结果而进行的各种国际合作尝试均告失败。为什么这个问题如此棘手？我们能否期待最后一刻的解决方案？是否会有一些国家，甚至所有国家，在均衡路径上屈服？我们通过一个模型来探讨这些问题，该模型以气候灾难的可能性为特征，并强调一个国家政策对其他国家产生的国际外部性，以及当代人对后代产生的跨期外部性。在此框架内，我们探讨了国际协议在多大程度上能够缓解气候变化问题。我们的分析阐明了国际气候协议在应对气候变化方面可能发挥的作用，并指出了即使在最佳情况下，此类协议所能实现的目标也存在重要局限性。

30679.title: Cognitive Decline and Dynamic Selection
30679.abstract: Understanding cognitive health, its decline, and the investments that shape its age profile in later life are important in an aging society, and yet, estimating the cognitive health production function is complicated by non-random mortality and sample attrition. I study this dynamic selection problem in the context of education, race, and cigarette smoking, characteristics thought to affect the level, but not slope, of cognitive decline. I develop a general framework that involves estimation of a system of dynamic equations consistent with the Grossman (1972) model. Exploiting exciting longitudinal data from the National Health and Aging Trends Study (NHATS), I find substantially wider gaps in cognitive health by these characteristics relative to cross-sectional comparisons, in some cases by 100%. Furthermore, these gaps grow in age, which suggests that the bias generated by dynamic selection is not constant. The implication of these results is that theories of cognitive decline need to accommodate differential rates of change -- rather than just differences in levels -- in cognitive health by education and race. Connecting theory and empirical work offers an important tool for economists studying health investment and health in older populations.
30679.zh_abstract: 理解认知健康、其衰退过程以及塑造其晚年年龄特征的投资，在一个老龄化社会中至关重要。然而，估计认知健康生产函数因非随机死亡和样本损耗而变得复杂。我研究了教育、种族和吸烟这一动态选择问题，这些特征被认为影响认知衰退的水平，而非斜率。我开发了一个通用框架，涉及估计与Grossman（1972）模型一致的一组动态方程。利用来自国家健康与老龄化趋势研究（NHATS）的令人兴奋的纵向数据，我发现相对于横截面比较，这些特征在认知健康方面的差距要大得多，在某些情况下甚至达到100%。此外，这些差距随年龄增长而扩大，这表明动态选择产生的偏差并非恒定不变。这些结果的含义是，认知衰退理论需要适应认知健康在教育与种族方面存在差异的变化率——而不仅仅是水平差异。将理论与实证工作联系起来，为研究老年人口健康投资与健康状况的经济学家提供了一个重要工具。

30678.title: On the Geographic Implications of Carbon Taxes
30678.authors: Bruno Conte, Klaus Desmet, Esteban Rossi-Hansberg
30678.abstract: A unilateral carbon tax trades off the distortionary costs of taxation and the future gains from slowing down global warming. Because the cost is local and immediate, whereas the benefit is global and delayed, this tradeoff tends to be unfavorable to unilateral carbon taxes. We show that this logic breaks down in a world with trade and migration where economic geography is shaped by agglomeration economies and congestion forces. Using a multisector dynamic spatial integrated assessment model (S-IAM), this paper predicts that a carbon tax introduced by the European Union (EU) and rebated locally can, if not too large, increase the size of Europe’s economy by concentrating economic activity in its high-productivity non-agricultural core and by incentivizing immigration to the EU. The resulting change in the spatial distribution of economic activity improves global efficiency and welfare. A unilateral carbon tax with local rebating introduced by the US generates similar global welfare gains. Other forms of rebating can dilute or revert this positive effect.
30678.zh_abstract: 单边碳税在税收的扭曲性成本与减缓全球变暖的未来收益之间进行权衡。由于成本是本地且即时的，而收益是全球且延迟的，这种权衡往往不利于单边碳税。我们表明，在一个存在贸易和移民、且经济地理由集聚经济和拥挤力量塑造的世界中，这一逻辑被打破。使用一个多部门动态空间综合评估模型（S-IAM），本文预测，由欧盟（EU）引入并在本地返还的碳税，如果规模不大，可以通过将经济活动集中在其高生产率的非农业核心地区，并激励移民进入欧盟，从而增加欧洲经济的规模。由此产生的经济活动空间分布变化提高了全球效率和福利。由美国引入并在本地返还的单边碳税产生了类似的全球福利收益。其他形式的返还可能会削弱或逆转这种积极效应。
