30678.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG, ITI, PE；JEL：F18, H23, O13, O44, Q56, R11

30677.title: Subjective Evaluations and Stratification in Graduate Education
30677.zh_title: 主观评价与研究生教育中的分层
30677.authors: Jessica Bai, Matthew Esche, W. Bentley MacLeod, Yifan Shi
30677.abstract: We introduce a model of the admissions process based upon standard agency theory and explore its implications with economics PhD admissions data from 2013-2019. We show that a subjective score that aggregates subjective ratings and recommendation letter features plays a more important role in determining admissions than an objective score based upon graduate record exam (GRE) scores. Subjective evaluations by references who write multiple letters are not only more influential than those of references who write one letter, but they are also more informative. Since multiple-letter references are also more highly ranked economists, this implies that there is a constraint on the supply of high-quality references. Moreover, we find that both the subjective and objective scores are correlated with job placement at a top economics department after the completion of the PhD. These indicators of individual achievement have a smaller effect than an undergraduate degree from an Ivy Plus school (i.e., Ivy League + Stanford, MIT, Duke, and Chicago). In the self-selected pool of applicants, Ivy Plus graduates are twice as likely to be admitted to a top 10 graduate program and are much more likely to obtain an assistant professor position at a top 10 program upon PhD completion. Given that Ivy Plus students must pass a stringent selection process to gain admission to their undergraduate program, we cannot reject the hypothesis that admission committees use information efficiently and fairly. However, this also implies that there may be a return to attending a selective undergraduate program in order to be pooled with highly skilled individuals.
30677.zh_abstract: 我们基于标准代理理论引入了一个招生过程模型，并利用2013-2019年经济学博士招生数据探讨其含义。我们表明，一个汇总了主观评分和推荐信特征的主观分数，在决定录取方面比基于研究生入学考试（GRE）成绩的客观分数起着更重要的作用。撰写多封推荐信的推荐人的主观评价不仅比只写一封推荐信的推荐人更有影响力，而且信息量也更大。由于撰写多封推荐信的推荐人同时也是排名更高的经济学家，这意味着高质量推荐信的供给存在约束。此外，我们发现主观和客观分数都与博士毕业后在顶级经济学系的就业安置相关。这些个人成就指标的影响小于拥有常春藤Plus（即常春藤联盟+斯坦福、麻省理工、杜克和芝加哥）本科学位的影响。在自我选择的申请者群体中，常春藤Plus毕业生被前10名研究生项目录取的可能性是其两倍，并且在博士毕业后获得前10名项目助理教授职位的可能性也大得多。鉴于常春藤Plus学生必须通过严格的选拔过程才能进入其本科项目，我们不能拒绝招生委员会高效且公平地使用信息的假设。然而，这也意味着，为了与高技能个体聚集在一起，就读于选拔性本科项目可能存在回报。

30676.title: Does "Made in China 2025" Work for China? Evidence from Chinese Listed Firms
30676.zh_title: “中国制造2025”对中国有效吗？来自中国上市公司的证据
30676.abstract: Rising concern over the impact of Chinese industrial policy has led to severe trade tensions between China and some of its major trading partners. In recent years, foreign criticism has increasingly focused on the so-called "Made in China 2025" initiative. In this paper, we use information extracted from Chinese listed firms' financial reports and a difference-in-differences approach to examine how the "Made in China 2025" policy initiative has impacted firms' receipt of subsidies, R&D expenditure, patenting, productivity, and profitability. We find that while more innovation promotion subsidies seem to flow into the listed firms targeted by the policy, we see little statistical evidence of productivity improvement or increases in R&D expenditure, patenting and profitability. This paper suggests that the “Made in China 2025” initiative may have not yet achieved its target goals.
30676.zh_abstract: 对中国产业政策影响的日益担忧已导致中国与其一些主要贸易伙伴之间出现严重的贸易紧张局势。近年来，外国批评越来越多地集中在所谓的“中国制造2025”倡议上。在本文中，我们利用从中国上市公司财务报告中提取的信息以及双重差分法，考察了“中国制造2025”政策倡议如何影响企业获得的补贴、研发支出、专利申请、生产率和盈利能力。我们发现，尽管更多的创新促进补贴似乎流向了该政策瞄准的上市公司，但我们几乎没有发现生产率提高或研发支出、专利申请和盈利能力增加的统计证据。本文表明，“中国制造2025”倡议可能尚未实现其目标。

30675.title: How Much Lifetime Social Security Benefits Are Americans Leaving On the Table?
30675.zh_title: 美国人放弃了多少终身社会保障福利？
30675.authors: David Altig, Laurence J. Kotlikoff, Victor Yifan Ye
30675.abstract: Americans are notoriously bad savers. Large numbers are reaching old age too poor to finance retirements that could last longer than they worked. This study uses the 2018 American Community Survey to impute retirement ages for 2019 Survey of Consumer Finance (SCF) respondents. Next, we run the SCF respondents through the Fiscal Analyzer (TFA) to measure the size and distribution of forgone lifetime Social Security benefits. TFA is a life-cycle, consumption-smoothing research tool that incorporates Social Security and all other major federal and state tax and benefit policies. The program can optimize lifetime Social Security choices. We find that virtually all American workers age 45 to 62 should wait beyond age 65 to collect. More than 90 percent should wait till age 70. Only 10.2 percent appear to do so. The median loss for this age group in the present value of household lifetime discretionary spending is $\$182,370$. Optimizing would produce a 10.4 percent increase in typical workers’ lifetime spending. For one in four, the lifetime spending gain exceeds 17 percent. For one in ten, the gain exceeds 26 percent. Among the poorest fifth of 45 to 62 year-olds, the median lifetime spending increase is 15.9 percent, with one in four gaining more than 27.4 percent.
30675.zh_abstract: 美国人是出了名的糟糕储蓄者。大量的人在年老时过于贫穷，无法为可能比他们工作年限更长的退休生活提供资金。本研究使用2018年美国社区调查来推算2019年消费者金融调查（SCF）受访者的退休年龄。接下来，我们通过财政分析器（TFA）运行SCF受访者，以衡量被放弃的终身社会保障福利的规模和分布。TFA是一个生命周期消费平滑研究工具，整合了社会保障以及所有其他主要的联邦和州税收与福利政策。该程序可以优化终身社会保障选择。我们发现，几乎所有年龄在45至62岁之间的美国工人都应该等到65岁之后才开始领取。超过90%的人应该等到70岁。似乎只有10.2%的人这样做。对于这个年龄段的人群，家庭终身可自由支配支出现值的损失中位数为182,370美元。优化将使典型工人的终身支出增加10.4%。对于四分之一的人来说，终身支出增长超过17%。对于十分之一的人来说，增长超过26%。在45至62岁最贫困的五分之一人群中，终身支出增长中位数为15.9%，四分之一的人增长超过27.4%。

30674.title: Does War Foster Cooperation or Parochialism? Evidence from a Natural Experiment among Turkish Conscripts
30674.zh_title: 战争促进合作还是狭隘主义？来自土耳其应征入伍者自然实验的证据
30674.abstract: Exploiting a natural experiment and an innovative survey design, we study the causal impact of armed conflict exposure (ACE) on the sociopolitical attitudes and behaviors of the average male randomly picked from the population. Contrary to the arguments that war fosters cooperation, we find little evidence of social or political participation in exposed individuals. Instead, we document compelling evidence that ACE promotes opposition to peaceful means of conflict resolution, animosity towards minorities, and adherence to right-wing ideology. Further analyses show war-driven grievances, the normalization of violence in everyday life, and changes in conservative norms and preferences as the transmitting pathways.
30674.zh_abstract: 利用一项自然实验和创新的调查设计，我们研究了武装冲突暴露（ACE）对从人口中随机挑选的普通男性的社会政治态度和行为的因果影响。与战争促进合作的观点相反，我们发现暴露个体在社会或政治参与方面几乎没有证据。相反，我们记录了令人信服的证据，表明ACE促进了反对和平解决冲突的方式、对少数群体的敌意以及对右翼意识形态的坚持。进一步分析表明，战争驱动的怨恨、暴力在日常生活中的正常化以及保守规范和偏好的变化是传导途径。

30673.title: Global Profit Shifting, 1975-2019
30673.abstract: This paper constructs time series of global profit shifting covering the 2015–19 period, during which major international efforts were implemented to curb profit shifting. We find that (i) multinational profits grew faster than global profits, (ii) the share of multinational profits booked in tax havens remained constant at around 37 per cent, and (iii) the fraction of global corporate tax revenue lost due to profit shifting rose from 9 to 10 per cent. We extend our time series back to 1975 and document a remarkable increase of multinational profits and global profit shifting from 1975 to 2019.
30673.zh_abstract: 本文构建了覆盖2015-2019年期间的全球利润转移时间序列，在此期间国际社会实施了重大举措以遏制利润转移。我们发现：（i）跨国企业利润增速超过全球利润增速；（ii）在避税天堂入账的跨国企业利润份额保持稳定，约为37%；（iii）因利润转移而损失的全球企业所得税收入占比从9%上升至10%。我们将时间序列回溯至1975年，并记录了从1975年到2019年跨国企业利润和全球利润转移的显著增长。

30672.title: Scope, Scale and Concentration: The 21st Century Firm
30672.zh_title: 范围、规模与集中度：21世纪的企业
30672.abstract: We provide evidence that over the past 30 years, U.S. firms have expanded their scope of operations. Increases in scope and scale were achieved largely without increasing traditional operating segments. Scope expansion significantly increases valuation and is primarily realized through acquisitions and investment in R&D, but not through capital expenditures. We show that traditional concentration ratios do not capture this expansion of scope. Our findings point to a new type of firm that increases scope through related expansion, which is highly valued by the market.
30672.zh_abstract: 我们提供的证据表明，在过去30年中，美国企业扩大了其经营范围。范围和规模的扩大在很大程度上并未增加传统运营部门。范围扩张显著提升了企业估值，且主要通过收购和研发投资实现，而非资本支出。我们表明，传统的集中度指标并未捕捉到这种范围扩张。我们的发现指向一种新型企业，它通过相关扩张来增加范围，这种扩张受到市场的高度评价。

30671.title: Intellectual Property Protection Lost and Competition: An Examination Using Machine Learning
30671.zh_title: 知识产权保护丧失与竞争：基于机器学习的考察
30671.authors: Utku U. Acikalin, Tolga Caskurlu, Gerard Hoberg, Gordon M. Phillips
30671.abstract: We examine the impact of lost intellectual property protection on innovation, competition, acquisitions, lawsuits and employment agreements. We consider firms whose ability to protect intellectual property (IP) using patents is weakened following the Alice Corp. vs. CLS Bank International Supreme Court decision. This decision has impacted patents in multiple areas including business methods, software, and bioinformatics. We use state-of-the-art machine learning techniques to identify firms’ existing patent portfolios’ potential exposure to the Alice decision. While all affected firms decrease patenting post-Alice, we find an unequal impact of decreased patent protection. Large affected firms benefit as their sales and market valuations increase, and their exposure to lawsuits decreases. They also acquire fewer firms post-Alice. Small affected firms lose as they face increased competition, product-market encroachment, and lower profits and valuations. They increase R&D and have their employees sign more nondisclosure agreements.
30671.zh_abstract: 我们考察了知识产权保护丧失对创新、竞争、收购、诉讼和雇佣协议的影响。我们关注那些在Alice Corp.诉CLS Bank International最高法院判决后，利用专利保护知识产权的能力被削弱的企业。该判决影响了包括商业方法、软件和生物信息学在内的多个领域的专利。我们使用最先进的机器学习技术来识别企业现有专利组合对Alice判决的潜在暴露程度。虽然所有受影响的企业在Alice判决后都减少了专利申请，但我们发现专利保护减弱的冲击并不平等。大型受影响企业受益，其销售额和市场估值上升，诉讼风险降低。它们在Alice判决后也收购了更少的企业。小型受影响企业则受损，面临竞争加剧、产品市场侵蚀以及利润和估值下降。它们增加了研发投入，并让员工签署了更多保密协议。
30671.meta: Programs：CF, PR；JEL：D43, G34, O31, O33, O34

30670.title: Can Anti-Vaping Policies Curb Drinking Externalities? Evidence from E-Cigarette Taxation and Traffic Fatalities
30670.zh_title: 反电子烟政策能否遏制饮酒的外部性？来自电子烟税和交通死亡事故的证据
30670.authors: Dhaval M. Dave, Yang Liang, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Joseph J. Sabia, Matthew Braaksma
30670.abstract: Teenage drinking is a major public health concern, generating social costs of over $\$28$ billion per year, including substantial external costs associated with alcohol-related traffic fatalities. At the same time, the high rate of electronic nicotine delivery systems (ENDS) use among teenagers has been deemed “an epidemic” by the U.S. Surgeon General, with state and local policymakers turning to e-cigarette taxes as a popular policy tool to curb nicotine vaping. This study is the first to explore the spillover effects of e-cigarette taxes on teenage drinking and alcohol-related traffic fatalities. We find that a one-dollar increase in e-cigarette taxes is associated with a 1 to 2 percentage-point reduction in the probability of binge drinking among teenagers and a 5 to 10 percent reduction in traffic fatalities involving teenagers driving under the influence of alcohol. Together, these results suggest the presence of alcohol-related health benefits from e-cigarette taxation.
30670.zh_abstract: 青少年饮酒是一个主要的公共卫生问题，每年造成超过280亿美元的社会成本，其中包括与酒精相关的交通死亡事故带来的大量外部成本。与此同时，美国卫生总监将青少年中电子尼古丁传送系统的高使用率称为“流行病”，州和地方政策制定者将电子烟税作为遏制尼古丁电子烟流行的常用政策工具。本研究首次探讨了电子烟税对青少年饮酒和酒精相关交通死亡事故的溢出效应。我们发现，电子烟税每增加1美元，青少年暴饮的概率降低1到2个百分点，涉及青少年酒后驾驶的交通死亡事故减少5%到10%。这些结果共同表明，征收电子烟税带来了与酒精相关的健康益处。

30669.title: Targeting Precision Medicine: Evidence from Prenatal Screening
30669.zh_title: 精准医疗的靶向：来自产前筛查的证据
30669.authors: Peter Conner, Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Petra Persson, Heidi L. Williams
30669.abstract: Medical technologies can target care to patients identified through screening, raising questions of how broadly to screen for potential use. We explore this empirically in the context of a non-invasive prenatal screening, cfDNA, which is used to target a more costly invasive test that elevates miscarriage risk. Using Swedish administrative data on prenatal choices for pregnancies conceived between 2011 and 2019 – a period in which Swedish regions began providing coverage for the new screening – we document that coverage of cfDNA substantially increases cfDNA screening and reduces invasive testing. To assess the impact of counterfactual targeting of cfDNA coverage, we develop and estimate a stylized model of prenatal choices. We find that narrow targeting of cfDNA coverage can improve outcomes and reduce costs, while broader coverage also improves outcomes but with increased costs. These findings point to the potential gains from well-designed targeting of screening, but at the same time highlight the importance of the targeting design.
30669.zh_abstract: 医疗技术可以通过筛查识别患者来靶向治疗，这引发了关于筛查潜在用途的广度问题。我们以无创产前筛查cfDNA为背景进行实证探索，该筛查用于靶向一种更昂贵且会增加流产风险的侵入性检测。利用2011年至2019年间受孕的孕期选择的瑞典行政数据——在此期间瑞典各地区开始为这种新筛查提供覆盖——我们记录了cfDNA的覆盖显著增加了cfDNA筛查并减少了侵入性检测。为了评估反事实的cfDNA覆盖靶向策略的影响，我们构建并估计了一个简化的孕期选择模型。我们发现，窄范围的cfDNA覆盖靶向可以改善结果并降低成本，而更广泛的覆盖也能改善结果但成本增加。这些发现指出了精心设计的筛查靶向策略的潜在收益，但同时也凸显了靶向设计的重要性。
30669.meta: Programs：AG, CH, EH, IO, LS, PE, PR；JEL：H31, I12, I13, I18, J13

30668.title: Distributional Effects of Local Minimum Wages: A Spatial Job Search Approach
30668.zh_title: 地方最低工资的分配效应：一种空间求职方法
30668.abstract: This paper develops and estimates a spatial general equilibrium job search model to study the effects of local and universal (federal) minimum wage policies on employment, wages, job postings, vacancies, migration/commuting, and welfare. In the model, workers, who differ in terms of location and education levels, search for jobs locally and in a neighboring area. If they receive remote offers, they decide whether to migrate or commute. Firms post vacancies in multiple locations and make offers subject to minimum wage constraints. The model is estimated using multiple databases, including the American Community Survey (ACS) and Quarterly Workforce Indicators (QWI), and exploiting minimum wage variation across state borders as well as time series variation (2005-2015). Results show that local minimum wage increases lead firms to post fewer wage offers in both local and neighboring areas and lead lower education workers to reduce interstate commuting. An out-of-sample validation finds that model forecasts of commuting responses to city minimum wage hikes are similar to patterns in the data. A welfare analysis shows how minimum wage effects vary by worker type and with the minimum wage level. Low skill workers benefit from local wage increases up to $\$10.75$/hour and high skill workers up to $\$12.25$/hour. The greatest per capital welfare gain (including both workers and firms) is achieved by a universal minimum wage increase of $\$12.75$/hour.
30668.zh_abstract: 本文开发并估计了一个空间一般均衡求职模型，以研究地方性和普适性（联邦）最低工资政策对就业、工资、职位发布、职位空缺、迁移/通勤和福利的影响。在该模型中，因地点和教育水平而异的工人在本地和邻近地区求职。如果他们收到远程工作机会，则决定是否迁移或通勤。企业在多个地点发布职位空缺，并在最低工资约束下提供工作机会。该模型利用多个数据库进行估计，包括美国社区调查和季度劳动力指标，并利用州际边界的最低工资差异以及时间序列变化（2005-2015年）。结果表明，地方最低工资上涨导致企业在本地和邻近地区发布的工资报价减少，并导致低教育水平工人减少跨州通勤。一项样本外验证发现，模型对城市最低工资上涨后通勤反应的预测与数据中的模式相似。福利分析显示了最低工资效应如何因工人类型和最低工资水平而异。低技能工人从地方工资上涨中受益，最高可达每小时10.75美元，高技能工人最高可达每小时12.25美元。人均福利（包括工人和企业）的最大增益是通过将普适性最低工资提高到每小时12.75美元实现的。

30667.title: Should Central Banks Have an Inequality Objective?
30667.zh_title: 中央银行是否应设定不平等目标？
30667.abstract: Should central banks care about inequality? To address this question, we extend a standard model of time inconsistency in monetary policy to allow for heterogeneity. As in the standard analysis, lack of policy commitment leads to a bias towards socially excessive inflation. But the novel result is that, in the presence of heterogeneity, the bias can be offset by assigning the central bank a mandate under which agents with higher nominal wealth are given a higher relative weight than under the social welfare function. In other words, society should choose a central banker that is less egalitarian than itself, a result reminiscent of Rogoff’s “conservative central banker”. Our analysis underscores that including a concern for redistribution in the central bank’s mandate can enhance policy credibility, but the details can be unexpected and should reflect the role of the mandate in overcoming policy distortions.
30667.zh_abstract: 中央银行是否应关注不平等？为回答这个问题，我们将货币政策时间不一致性的标准模型扩展到包含异质性。与标准分析一样，缺乏政策承诺会导致社会性过度通胀的偏差。但新颖的结果是，在存在异质性的情况下，这种偏差可以通过赋予中央银行一个任务来抵消，在该任务下，名义财富较高的代理人被赋予比社会福利函数下更高的相对权重。换句话说，社会应选择一个比自身更不平等的中央银行行长，这一结果让人联想到罗格夫的“保守的中央银行行长”。我们的分析强调，将再分配关切纳入中央银行的任务可以增强政策可信度，但具体细节可能出乎意料，并且应反映该任务在克服政策扭曲中的作用。

30666.title: US Immigration from Latin America in Historical Perspective
30666.zh_title: 历史视角下的美国拉丁美洲移民
30666.authors: Gordon H. Hanson, Pia Orrenius, Madeline Zavodny
30666.abstract: The share of US residents who were born in Latin America and the Caribbean plateaued recently, after a half century of rapid growth. Our review of the evidence on the US immigration wave from the region suggests that it bears many similarities to the major immigration waves of the 19th and early 20th centuries, that the demographic and economic forces behind Latin American migrant inflows appear to have weakened across most sending countries, and that a continued slowdown of immigration from Latin America post-pandemic has the potential to disrupt labor-intensive sectors in many US regional labor markets.
30666.zh_abstract: 出生于拉丁美洲和加勒比地区的美国居民比例在经历了半个世纪的快速增长后，近期趋于平稳。我们对来自该地区的美国移民浪潮的证据进行的回顾表明，它与19世纪和20世纪初的主要移民浪潮有许多相似之处，推动拉丁美洲移民流入的人口和经济力量在大多数输出国似乎已经减弱，并且疫情后拉丁美洲移民的持续放缓有可能扰乱美国许多地区劳动力市场中的劳动密集型行业。

30665.title: Can Information and Advising Affect Postsecondary Participation and Attainment for Non-Traditional Students? Evidence from a Large-Scale Experiment with the U.S. Army
30665.zh_title: 信息与咨询能否影响非传统学生的中学后教育参与及成就？来自美国陆军大规模实验的证据
30665.authors: Andrew C. Barr, Kelli A. Bird, Benjamin L. Castleman, William L. Skimmyhorn
30665.abstract: Lack of information and advising prior to college matriculation may contribute to poor post-secondary outcomes among non-traditional students. We conducted a large-scale, multi-arm field experiment with the U.S. Army to investigate whether a package of research-based personalized information and access to advising affects postsecondary choices and attainment among a large non-traditional adult population. We find no impact of the intervention on whether veterans enroll in college, on the quality of their college enrollment, or on their persistence in college. Our results suggest that influencing non-traditional populations’ educational decisions and outcomes will require substantially more intensive programs.
30665.zh_abstract: 在大学入学前缺乏信息和咨询可能导致非传统学生中学后教育成果不佳。我们与美国陆军合作开展了一项大规模、多组别的实地实验，以探究一套基于研究的个性化信息及咨询获取服务，是否会影响大量非传统成年人群体的中学后教育选择与成就。我们发现，该干预措施对退伍军人是否进入大学、其大学入学质量或他们在大学中的持续就读情况均无影响。我们的结果表明，要影响非传统人群的教育决策和成果，需要投入强度大得多的项目。

30664.title: Firm Responses to State Hiring Subsidies: Regression Discontinuity Evidence from a Tax Credit Formula
30664.zh_title: 企业对州级雇佣补贴的响应：来自税收抵免公式的断点回归证据
30664.authors: Benjamin G. Hyman, Matthew Freedman, Shantanu Khanna, David Neumark
30664.abstract: We examine firm responses to location-based hiring subsidies. We leverage institutional features of the California Competes Tax Credit (CCTC), a large-scale business incentive program that incorporates best practices from prior job creation policies. The CCTC award selection procedure combines formula-based and discretionary components. Leveraging applicant score eligibility cutoffs in a regression discontinuity design and taking advantage of rich longitudinal microdata on establishments and their parent firms, we find that firms expand activity in California in response to CCTC awards, particularly in disadvantaged parts of the state. Our results suggest that targeted and audited hiring subsidies can be effective in promoting local business expansions. We also examine the potential spillovers to other states and do not find strong evidence that the CCTC induces significant cross-state displacement effects.
30664.zh_abstract: 我们研究了企业对基于地点的雇佣补贴的响应。我们利用了加州竞争税收抵免（CCTC）的制度特征，这是一项大规模商业激励计划，融合了先前就业创造政策的最佳实践。CCTC奖励的筛选程序结合了基于公式和自由裁量的组成部分。我们利用申请者评分资格临界点进行断点回归设计，并利用关于企业及其母公司的丰富纵向微观数据，发现企业因CCTC奖励而扩大了在加州的业务活动，尤其是在该州的弱势地区。我们的结果表明，有针对性的、经过审计的雇佣补贴可以有效促进本地企业扩张。我们还考察了对其他州的潜在溢出效应，并未发现强有力的证据表明CCTC引发了显著的跨州转移效应。
30664.meta: Programs：LS, PE；JEL：H25, H71, H73, J23, J38, R12, R38, R58

30663.title: The Gift of a Lifetime: The Hospital, Modern Medicine, and Mortality
30663.zh_title: 一生的馈赠：医院、现代医学与死亡率
30663.authors: Alex Hollingsworth, Krzysztof Karbownik, Melissa A. Thomasson, Anthony Wray
30663.abstract: We explore how access to modern hospitals and medicine affects mortality by leveraging efforts of The Duke Endowment to modernize hospitals in the early-twentieth century. The Endowment helped communities build and expand hospitals, obtain state-of-the-art medical technology, attract qualified medical personnel, and refine management practices. We find that Duke support increased the size and quality of the medical sector, fostering growth in not-for-profit hospitals and high-quality physicians. Duke funding reduced both infant mortality - with larger effects for Black infants than White infants - and long-run mortality. Finally, we find that communities aided by Duke benefited more from medical innovations.
30663.zh_abstract: 我们通过利用杜克基金会在20世纪初推动医院现代化的努力，探讨了获得现代医院和医疗服务如何影响死亡率。该基金会帮助社区建设和扩建医院、获取最先进的医疗技术、吸引合格的医务人员并改进管理实践。我们发现，杜克的支持增加了医疗部门的规模和素质，促进了非营利医院和高质量医生的增长。杜克的资助降低了婴儿死亡率——对黑人婴儿的影响大于白人婴儿——并降低了长期死亡率。最后，我们发现，得到杜克援助的社区从医学创新中获益更多。

30662.title: The Remote Work Revolution: Impact on Real Estate Values and the Urban Environment
30662.zh_title: 远程工作革命：对房地产价值与城市环境的影响
30662.abstract: The covid-19 pandemic induced a major shift in the prevalence of remote and hybrid work arrangements. This article reviews the effects of this remote work revolution for residential and commercial real estate values and for the future of cities. It also discusses consequences for productivity, innovation, local public finance, and the climate, as well as potential policy responses.
30662.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情引发了远程和混合工作安排普及率的重大转变。本文回顾了这场远程工作革命对住宅和商业房地产价值以及城市未来的影响。文章还讨论了对生产力、创新、地方公共财政和气候的影响，以及潜在的政策应对措施。
30662.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, PE；JEL：G12, H71, R12, R23, R31, R51

30661.title: Who Benefits from Hazardous Waste Cleanups? Evidence from the Housing Market
30661.zh_title: 谁从危险废物清理中受益？来自住房市场的证据
30661.authors: Alecia W. Cassidy, Elaine L. Hill, Lala Ma
30661.abstract: The Resource Conservation and Recovery Act (RCRA) manages cleanup of hazardous waste releases at over 3,500 sites across the US, which covers approximately 17.9 million of all developed land in the country. We use publicly available Census survey data (Decennial and American Communities Survey) to evaluate the national and distributional housing market impacts of these cleanups. We find that cleanups near residential properties yield significant, yet localized, increases in home prices, and that impacts are concentrated in the lower deciles of the price distribution. Importantly, we find fairly weak evidence of sorting along sociodemographic dimensions in response to cleanup. Our findings suggest that cleanup benefits accrue to the residents who are the original ‘hosts’ of pollution and could correct pre-existing disparities in exposure to land-based contamination.
30661.zh_abstract: 《资源保护与回收法案》（RCRA）管理着美国超过3500个场地的危险废物释放清理工作，覆盖了全国约1790万英亩的所有已开发土地。我们利用公开可用的人口普查调查数据（十年一次的人口普查和美国社区调查）来评估这些清理工作对全国及不同分布区域的住房市场影响。我们发现，住宅物业附近的清理工作带来了显著但局部化的房价上涨，且影响集中在价格分布的低十分位数组。重要的是，我们发现关于清理后按社会人口维度进行居住分层的证据相当薄弱。我们的研究结果表明，清理带来的好处归于最初遭受污染的居民，并可能纠正先前存在的土地污染暴露方面的不平等。

30660.title: Sea Level Rise Exposure and Municipal Bond Yields
30660.zh_title: 海平面上升暴露风险与市政债券收益率
30660.authors: Paul Goldsmith-Pinkham, Matthew T. Gustafson, Ryan C. Lewis, Michael Schwert
30660.abstract: Municipal bond markets begin pricing sea level rise (SLR) exposure risk in 2013, coinciding with upward revisions to worst-case SLR projections and accompanying uncertainty around these projections. The effect is larger for long-maturity bonds and is not solely driven by near-term flood risk. We use a structural model of credit risk to quantify the implied economic impact and distinguish the effects of underlying asset values and uncertainty. The SLR exposure premium exhibits a different trend from house prices and is unaffected by house price controls. Taken together, our results highlight the importance of climate uncertainty in driving municipal bond prices.
30660.zh_abstract: 市政债券市场从2013年开始对海平面上升（SLR）暴露风险进行定价，这与最坏情景下海平面上升预测的上调以及伴随这些预测的不确定性同时发生。这种效应对长期债券更为显著，且并非仅由近期洪水风险驱动。我们使用一个结构性信用风险模型来量化隐含的经济影响，并区分基础资产价值与不确定性的效应。海平面上升暴露溢价呈现出与房价不同的趋势，且不受房价控制措施的影响。综合来看，我们的结果凸显了气候不确定性在推动市政债券价格方面的重要性。

30659.title: Automation and the Workforce: A Firm-Level View from the 2019 Annual Business Survey
30659.zh_title: 自动化与劳动力：来自2019年年度商业调查的企业层面视角
30659.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Gary W. Anderson, David N. Beede, Cathy Buffington, Eric E. Childress, Emin Dinlersoz, Lucia S. Foster, Nathan Goldschlag, John C. Haltiwanger, Zachary Kroff, Pascual Restrepo, Nikolas Zolas
30659.abstract: This paper describes the adoption of automation technologies by US firms across all economic sectors by leveraging a new module introduced in the 2019 Annual Business Survey, conducted by the US Census Bureau in partnership with the National Center for Science and Engineering Statistics (NCSES). The module collects data from over 300,000 firms on the use of five advanced technologies: AI, robotics, dedicated equipment, specialized software, and cloud computing. The adoption of these technologies remains low (especially for AI and robotics), varies substantially across industries, and concentrates on large and young firms. However, because larger firms are much more likely to adopt them, 12-64% of US workers and 22-72% of manufacturing workers are exposed to these technologies. Firms report a variety of motivations for adoption, including automating tasks previously performed by labor. Consistent with the use of these technologies for automation, adopters have higher labor productivity and lower labor shares. In particular, the use of these technologies is associated with a 11.4% higher labor productivity, which accounts for 20-30% of the difference in labor productivity between large firms and the median firm in an industry. Adopters report that these technologies raised skill requirements and led to greater demand for skilled labor but brought limited or ambiguous effects to their employment levels.
30659.zh_abstract: 本文利用美国人口普查局与国家科学与工程统计中心（NCSES）合作开展的2019年年度商业调查中引入的一个新模块，描述了美国各经济部门企业采用自动化技术的情况。该模块从超过30万家企业收集了关于五种先进技术使用情况的数据：人工智能、机器人、专用设备、专业软件和云计算。这些技术的采用率仍然较低（尤其是人工智能和机器人），在不同行业间差异显著，并集中在大型和年轻企业。然而，由于大型企业采用这些技术的可能性大得多，美国12-64%的工人和制造业22-72%的工人暴露于这些技术之下。企业报告了多种采用动机，包括自动化以前由劳动力执行的任务。与将这些技术用于自动化目的一致，采用者的劳动生产率更高，劳动份额更低。特别是，这些技术的使用与11.4%的更高劳动生产率相关，这解释了行业内大型企业与中位数企业之间劳动生产率差异的20-30%。采用者报告称，这些技术提高了技能要求，导致对技能劳动力的需求增加，但对它们的就业水平产生了有限或模糊的影响。

30658.title: Heterogeneity in Damages from A Pandemic
30658.zh_title: 大流行病造成的损害异质性
30658.authors: Amy Finkelstein, Geoffrey Kocks, Maria Polyakova, Victoria Udalova
30658.abstract: We use linked survey and administrative data to document and decompose the striking differences across demographic groups in both economic and health impacts of the first year of the COVID-19 pandemic in the United States. The impacts of the pandemic on all-cause mortality and on employment were concentrated in the same racial, ethnic, and education groups, with non-White individuals and those without a college degree experiencing higher excess all-cause mortality as well as a greater employment loss. Observable differences in living arrangements and the nature of work – which likely affected exposure to the virus and to economic contractions – can explain 15 percent of the Hispanic-White difference in excess mortality, almost one-quarter of the non- Hispanic Black-White difference, and almost half of the difference between those with and without a Bachelor’s degree; they can also explain 35 to 40 percent of the differences in economic damages between these groups. These findings underscore the importance of non-medical factors in contributing to the disparate impacts of public health shocks.
30658.zh_abstract: 我们利用关联的调查和行政数据，记录并分解了美国COVID-19大流行第一年不同人口群体在经济和健康影响方面存在的显著差异。大流行对全因死亡率和就业的影响集中在相同的种族、族裔和教育群体中，非白人和没有大学学位的人经历了更高的超额全因死亡率以及更大的就业损失。在居住安排和工作性质方面的可观察差异——这些差异可能影响病毒暴露和经济收缩暴露——可以解释西班牙裔与白人之间超额死亡率差异的15%、非西班牙裔黑人与白人之间差异的近四分之一，以及拥有学士学位与没有学士学位人群之间差异的近一半；这些差异还可以解释这些群体之间经济损失差异的35%至40%。这些发现强调了非医疗因素在导致公共卫生冲击影响不均等方面的重要性。

30657.title: The Big Three and Board Gender Diversity: The Effectiveness of Shareholder Voice
30657.zh_title: 三大机构投资者与董事会性别多元化：股东发声的有效性
30657.authors: Todd A. Gormley, Vishal K. Gupta, David A. Matsa, Sandra C. Mortal, Lukai Yang
30657.abstract: In 2017, “The Big Three” institutional investors launched campaigns to increase gender diversity on corporate boards. We estimate that their campaigns led American corporations to add at least 2.5 times as many female directors in 2019 as they had in 2016. Firms increased diversity by identifying candidates beyond managers’ existing networks and by placing less emphasis on candidates’ executive experience. Firms also promoted more female directors to key board positions, indicating firms’ responses went beyond tokenism. Our results highlight index investors’ ability to effectuate broad-based governance changes and the important impact of investor buy-in in increasing corporate-leadership diversity.
30657.zh_abstract: 2017年，“三大”机构投资者发起了旨在提高公司董事会性别多元化的运动。我们估计，这些运动促使美国公司在2019年新增的女性董事人数至少是2016年的2.5倍。公司通过识别管理者现有社交网络之外的候选人，并减少对候选人高管经验的重视程度，从而增加了多元化。公司还将更多女性董事提拔到关键董事会职位，这表明公司的回应超越了象征主义。我们的结果突显了指数投资者推动广泛治理变革的能力，以及投资者支持在增加企业领导层多元化方面的重要影响。

30656.title: Collaboration Between and Within Groups
30656.zh_title: 群体内与群体间的协作
30656.authors: Matias Iaryczower, Santiago Oliveros, Parth Parihar
30656.abstract: We study the ability of multi-group teams to undertake binary projects in a decentralized environment. The equilibrium outcomes of our model display familiar features in collaborative settings, including inefficient gradualism, inaction, and contribution cycles, wherein groups alternate taking responsibility for moving the project forward. Expected delay grows more than proportionally with project size, and some welfare-enhancing projects are not completed, even as agents become arbitrarily patient. A team composed of two equally large groups can complete larger projects than a fully homogenous team, even as the difference in preferences for completion among the two groups is arbitrarily small. Moreover, if the project is sufficiently large, the two-group team always completes the project strictly faster.
30656.zh_abstract: 我们研究了多群体团队在去中心化环境中承担二元项目的能力。我们模型的均衡结果展现了协作环境中常见的特征，包括低效的渐进主义、不作为以及贡献周期，其中群体交替承担推进项目的责任。预期延迟的增长速度超过项目规模的比例增长，并且即使代理人变得任意耐心，一些增进福利的项目也无法完成。一个由两个规模相等的群体组成的团队可以完成比完全同质团队更大的项目，即使这两个群体在完成项目的偏好差异任意小。此外，如果项目足够大，双群体团队总是能严格更快地完成项目。

30655.title: Identification and Estimation of Continuous-Time Job Search Models with Preference Shocks
30655.zh_title: 带有偏好冲击的连续时间工作搜寻模型的识别与估计
30655.authors: Peter Arcidiacono, Attila Gyetvai, Arnaud Maurel, Ekaterina S. Jardim
30655.abstract: This paper applies some of the key insights of dynamic discrete choice models to continuous-time job search models. We propose a novel framework that incorporates preference shocks into search models, resulting in a tight connection between value functions and conditional choice probabilities. Including preference shocks allows us to establish constructive identification of all the model parameters. Our method also makes it possible to estimate rich nonstationary job search models in a simple and tractable way, without having to solve any differential equations. We apply our framework to rich longitudinal data from Hungarian administrative records, allowing for nonstationarities in offer arrival rates, wage offers, and in the flow payoff of unemployment. Longer unemployment durations are associated with substantially worse wage offers and lower offer arrival rates, which results in accepted wages falling over time.
30655.zh_abstract: 本文将动态离散选择模型的一些关键见解应用于连续时间工作搜寻模型。我们提出了一个新颖的框架，将偏好冲击纳入搜寻模型，从而在价值函数和条件选择概率之间建立了紧密联系。纳入偏好冲击使我们能够建设性地识别所有模型参数。我们的方法还使得能够以简单易处理的方式估计丰富的非平稳工作搜寻模型，而无需解任何微分方程。我们将我们的框架应用于匈牙利行政记录中的丰富纵向数据，允许工作机会到达率、工资报价以及失业流动收益存在非平稳性。更长的失业持续时间与显著更差的工资报价和更低的工作机会到达率相关，这导致被接受的工资随时间下降。

30654.title: Investment and Subjective Uncertainty
30654.authors: Nicholas Bloom, Steven J. Davis, Lucia S. Foster, Scott W. Ohlmacher, Itay Saporta-Eksten
30654.abstract: A longstanding challenge in evaluating the impact of uncertainty on investment is obtaining measures of managers’ subjective uncertainty. We address this challenge by using a detailed new survey measure of subjective uncertainty collected by the U.S. Census Bureau for approximately 25,000 manufacturing plants. We find three key results. First, investment is strongly and robustly negatively associated with higher uncertainty, with a two standard deviation increase in uncertainty associated with about a 6% reduction in investment. Second, uncertainty is also negatively related to employment growth and overall shipments (sales) growth, which highlights the damaging impact of uncertainty on firm growth. Third, flexible inputs like rental capital and temporary workers show a positive relationship to uncertainty, demonstrating that businesses switch from less flexible to more flexible factor inputs at higher levels of uncertainty.
30654.zh_abstract: 在评估不确定性对投资影响时，一个长期存在的挑战是获取管理者主观不确定性的度量。我们通过使用美国人口普查局收集的约25,000家制造工厂的详细新调查度量来应对这一挑战。我们发现了三个关键结果。首先，投资与较高的不确定性呈强烈且稳健的负相关，不确定性每增加两个标准差，投资约减少6%。其次，不确定性也与就业增长和总出货量（销售额）增长负相关，这突显了不确定性对企业增长的破坏性影响。第三，像租赁资本和临时工这样的灵活投入与不确定性呈正相关，表明企业在不确定性较高时从较不灵活的要素投入转向更灵活的要素投入。

30653.title: Public Childcare, Labor Market Outcomes of Caregivers, and Child Development: Experimental Evidence from Brazil
30653.zh_title: 公共托儿服务、照护者的劳动力市场结果与儿童发展：来自巴西的实验证据
30653.authors: Orazio Attanasio, Ricardo Paes de Barros, Pedro Carneiro, David K. Evans, Lycia Lima, Pedro Olinto, Norbert Schady
30653.abstract: This study examines the impact of publicly provided daycare for children aged 0-3 on outcomes of children and their caregivers over the course of seven years after enrollment into daycare. At the end of 2007, the city of Rio de Janeiro in Brazil used a lottery to assign children to limited public daycare openings. Winning the lottery translated to a 34 percent increase in total time in daycare during a child’s first four years of life. This allowed caregivers more time to work, resulting in higher incomes for beneficiary households in the first year of daycare attendance and 4 years later (but not after 7 years, by which time all children were eligible for universal schooling). The rise in labor force participation is driven primarily by grandparents and by adolescent siblings residing in the same household as (and possibly caring for) the child, and not by parents, most of whom were already working. Beneficiary children saw sustained gains in height-for-age and weight-for- age, likely due to the better nutritional intake they benefit from in daycare. Shorter term gains in beneficiary children’s cognitive development were also observed, driven primarily by a short term improvement in home resources and environments.
30653.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了为0-3岁儿童提供的公共日托对儿童及其照护者在入托后七年内结果的影响。2007年底，巴西里约热内卢市通过抽签将儿童分配到有限的公共日托名额。中签使得儿童在生命前四年中在日托的总时间增加了34%。这使照护者有更多时间工作，从而在入托第一年和四年后（但七年后未观察到，此时所有儿童已有资格接受普及教育）使受益家庭收入增加。劳动力参与率的上升主要由与儿童同住（并可能照看儿童）的祖父母和青少年兄弟姐妹驱动，而非父母（其中大多数已在工作）。受益儿童在年龄别身高和年龄别体重方面获得了持续改善，这很可能得益于他们在日托中获得的更好营养摄入。还观察到受益儿童认知发展的短期增益，这主要由家庭资源和环境的短期改善驱动。

30652.title: Inflation and Capital Flows
30652.abstract: Over the latest monetary policy tightening cycle, capital has been flowing from jurisdictions with the least aggressive hiking profiles to those with the most aggressive ones. This pattern of capital flows is consistent with the predictions of a standard open-economy model with nominal rigidities where cost-push shocks generate an inflationary episode and capital flows freely across countries. Yet, by raising demand for domestic non-tradable goods and services, capital inflows cause unwelcome upward pressure on firms’ costs in countries most severely hit by these shocks. We argue that a reverse pattern of capital flows would have improved the output-inflation trade-off globally, hence requiring a less aggressive monetary tightening in most severely hit countries and delivering overall welfare gains.
30652.zh_abstract: 在最近一轮货币政策紧缩周期中，资本从加息幅度最小的司法管辖区流向加息幅度最大的司法管辖区。这种资本流动模式与一个标准的名义刚性开放经济模型的预测一致，在该模型中，成本推动冲击引发通胀，资本在国家间自由流动。然而，通过增加对国内非贸易商品和服务的需求，资本流入对这些冲击影响最严重的国家的企业成本造成了不受欢迎的上行压力。我们认为，反向的资本流动模式本可以改善全球的产出-通胀权衡，从而在受影响最严重的国家需要不那么激进的货币紧缩，并带来整体福利收益。
30652.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E32, E44, E52, F32, F41, F42

30651.title: Experience Rating as an Automatic Stabilizer
30651.zh_title: 经验评级作为自动稳定器
30651.authors: Mark Duggan, Andrew C. Johnston, Audrey Guo
30651.abstract: Unemployment insurance taxes are experience-rated to penalize firms that dismiss workers. We examine whether experience rating acts as an automatic stabilizer in the labor market. We exploit the fact that penalties for layoffs vary by state using detailed data on state tax schedules, and we measure whether firms react less to labor-demand shocks in the presence of greater layoff penalties. The average penalty for layoffs reduces firm adjustment to negative shocks by 11 percent. The results imply experience rating has a stabilizing influence on labor markets. Experience rating saved, for instance, nearly a million jobs in the Great Recession.
30651.zh_abstract: 失业保险税采用经验评级，以惩罚解雇工人的企业。我们考察经验评级是否在劳动力市场中充当自动稳定器。我们利用各州税收计划的详细数据，利用解雇惩罚因州而异的事实，并衡量企业在面临更大解雇惩罚时是否对劳动力需求冲击的反应更小。解雇的平均惩罚使企业对负面冲击的调整减少了11%。结果表明，经验评级对劳动力市场具有稳定作用。例如，在大衰退期间，经验评级挽救了近一百万个工作岗位。

30697.title: How do Behavioral Approaches to Increase Savings Compare? Evidence from Multiple Interventions in the U.S. Army
30697.zh_title: 行为方法如何比较以增加储蓄？来自美国陆军多项干预措施的证据
30697.authors: Richard W. Patterson, William L. Skimmyhorn
30697.abstract: Information provision, choice simplification, social messaging, active-choice frameworks, and automatic enrollment all increase retirement savings. However, gauging the relative efficacy of these approaches is challenging because the supporting evidence spans widely different institutional settings, populations, and time periods. In this study, we leverage experimental and quasi-experimental variation in a constant setting, the U.S. military between 2016-2018, to examine the effects of nearly two dozen experiments for four leading policy options (i.e., information emails, action steps, target contribution rates, active choice, and automatic enrollment) designed to increase retirement savings. Consistent with previous literature, we find sizable effects of savings interventions on participation and cumulative contributions that increase with the intensity of the intervention. We then exploit cost data to complete the first cost-effectiveness analysis in the literature. Our analysis suggests that active choice programs are the most cost-effective method to generate new program participation and contributions for small, medium, and large firms, while automatic enrollment is more cost-effective for very large firms.
30697.zh_abstract: 信息提供、选择简化、社会信息传递、主动选择框架和自动注册都能增加退休储蓄。然而，评估这些方法的相对有效性具有挑战性，因为支持证据跨越了截然不同的制度环境、人群和时间段。在本研究中，我们利用2016-2018年间美国军队这一恒定环境中的实验和准实验变异，检验了旨在增加退休储蓄的四种主要政策选项（即信息邮件、行动步骤、目标缴款率、主动选择和自动注册）的近二十项实验的效果。与先前文献一致，我们发现储蓄干预对参与率和累计缴款额有显著影响，且效果随干预强度增加而增强。然后，我们利用成本数据完成了文献中首次成本效益分析。我们的分析表明，对于小型、中型和大型企业，主动选择计划是产生新项目参与和缴款的最具成本效益的方法，而对于超大型企业，自动注册更具成本效益。
30697.meta: Programs：AG, PE；JEL：D14, D91, G41, G51, J45

30696.title: Financial Regret at Older Ages and Longevity Awareness
30696.zh_title: 老年期的财务遗憾与长寿意识
30696.abstract: Many older people express regret about undersaving; here, we extend prior work by reporting regret about five other critical financial topics. Using the Health and Retirement Study, we first show that older people who regret past financial decisions differ significantly from those who do not. Second, in an experiment, we demonstrate that informing people about objective survival probabilities increases regret about not buying lifetime income by 42% overall, and by more among the high income or those in good health. We also document that, for some, providing such information increases regret about having claimed social security early and undersaving. These results may explain previous findings about why survival information can alter financial decisions.
30696.zh_abstract: 许多老年人表达了对储蓄不足的遗憾；在此，我们通过报告关于其他五个关键财务主题的遗憾来扩展先前的工作。利用健康与退休研究，我们首先表明，对过去财务决策感到遗憾的老年人与不感到遗憾的人在显著差异。其次，在一项实验中，我们证明，告知人们客观生存概率会使对未购买终身收入的遗憾总体增加42%，在高收入或健康状况良好的人群中增加更多。我们还记录到，对于某些人来说，提供此类信息会增加对提前领取社会保障金和储蓄不足的遗憾。这些结果可能解释了先前关于为何生存信息能改变财务决策的发现。
30696.meta: Programs：AG, LS；JEL：D14, D15, D83, G22, G41, G51

30695.title: Internal Adjustment Costs of Firm-Specific Factors and the Neoclassical Theory of the Firm
30695.zh_title: 企业特定因素的内部调整成本与新古典企业理论
30695.abstract: This paper considers the consequences of a two-sector vertically-integrated model of firms producing output using firm-specific capital with a second sector producing firm-specific capital by adapting raw capital purchased in the market. Analysts rarely observe each sector separately. Aggregating over both sectors produces short-run and long-run factor demand functions that appear to be perverse, but when disaggregated obey standard neoclassical properties. Adjustment costs create the appearance of static inefficiency in the presence of dynamic efficiency.
30695.zh_abstract: 本文考虑了一个两部门垂直整合模型的结果，其中企业使用企业特定资本生产产出，并通过调整从市场购买的原始资本来生产企业特定资本的第二个部门。分析者很少单独观察每个部门。对两个部门进行加总会产生看似反常的短期和长期要素需求函数，但分解后则遵循标准的新古典性质。调整成本在动态效率存在的情况下造成了静态无效率的表象。

30694.title: Measuring Religion from Behavior: Climate Shocks and Religious Adherence in Afghanistan
30694.zh_title: 从行为衡量宗教信仰：阿富汗的气候冲击与宗教虔诚度
30694.authors: Oeindrila Dube, Joshua Blumenstock, Michael Callen
30694.abstract: Religious adherence has been hard to study in part because it is hard to measure. We develop a new measure of religious adherence, which is granular in both time and space, using anonymized mobile phone transaction records. After validating the measure with traditional data, we show how it can shed light on the nature of religious adherence in Islamic societies. Exploiting random variation in climate, we find that as economic conditions in Afghanistan worsen, people become more religiously observant. The effects are most pronounced in areas where droughts have the biggest economic consequences, such as croplands without access to irrigation.
30694.zh_abstract: 宗教信仰之所以难以研究，部分原因在于其难以衡量。我们利用匿名手机交易记录，开发了一种在时间和空间上都具有细粒度性的宗教信仰新衡量指标。在用传统数据验证该指标后，我们展示了它如何揭示伊斯兰社会中宗教信仰的本质。利用气候的随机变异，我们发现，随着阿富汗经济状况恶化，人们变得更加虔诚。这种效应在干旱带来最大经济后果的地区最为显著，例如无法获得灌溉的农田。
30694.meta: Programs：DEV, POL；JEL：O13, Q1, Q15, Q54, Z10, Z12

30693.title: Maternal and Infant Health Inequality: New Evidence from Linked Administrative Data
30693.zh_title: 母婴健康不平等：来自关联行政数据的新证据
30693.authors: Kate Kennedy-Moulton, Sarah Miller, Petra Persson, Maya Rossin-Slater, Laura Wherry, Gloria Aldana
30693.abstract: We use linked administrative data on the universe of California births to provide novel evidence on economic inequality in infant and maternal health. Infants and mothers at the top of the income distribution have worse birth and morbidity outcomes than their lowest-income counterparts, but are nevertheless the least likely to die in the year following birth. Racial disparities swamp these income disparities, with no racial convergence in health outcomes as income rises. A comparison with Sweden shows that infant and maternal health is worse in California at virtually all income levels.
30693.zh_abstract: 我们利用加利福尼亚州所有出生人口的关联行政数据，提供了关于婴儿和孕产妇健康经济不平等的新证据。收入分配顶层的婴儿和母亲在出生和发病率结果上比最低收入群体更差，但他们在出生后一年内死亡的可能性却最低。种族差异淹没了这些收入差异，随着收入增加，健康结果没有出现种族趋同。与瑞典的比较表明，加利福尼亚州几乎所有收入水平的婴儿和孕产妇健康状况都更差。

30692.title: Inflation Hedging on Main Street? Evidence from Retail TIPS Fund Flows
30692.zh_title: 主街上的通胀对冲？来自零售TIPS基金流动的证据
30692.abstract: Households participating in financial markets pay attention to inflation news when making their investment decisions, even in an environment of mostly low and stable inflation. ETFs and open-ended mutual funds holding Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities (TIPS) receive inflows from retail investors, and nominal Treasury ETF experience outflows, when long-horizon market-based inflation expectations measures increase. Changes in household survey expectations or in measures of inflation uncertainty do not contribute much in explaining retail TIPS fund flows. Retail flows into TIPS funds are asymmetric, with strong reactions only to positive inflation news, and sticky, with flow responses to news gradually playing out over several months. Retail investors appear to pay some attention to regular Federal Reserve announcements, but major events such as the ``taper tantrum'' in May 2013, the presidential election in November 2016, and the COVID-19 crisis in March 2020 are associated with particularly large retail TIPS fund flows.
30692.zh_abstract: 参与金融市场的家庭在做出投资决策时会关注通胀新闻，即使在通胀大多较低且稳定的环境中也是如此。当基于市场的长期通胀预期指标上升时，持有通胀保值国债的ETF和开放式共同基金从散户投资者那里获得资金流入，而名义国债ETF则经历资金流出。家庭调查预期或通胀不确定性指标的变化对解释零售TIPS基金流动贡献不大。零售资金流入TIPS基金是不对称的，仅对正面通胀新闻有强烈反应，并且是粘性的，资金流动对新闻的反应在几个月内逐渐显现。散户投资者似乎对美联储的常规公告有所关注，但诸如2013年5月的“缩减恐慌”、2016年11月的总统选举和2020年3月的COVID-19危机等重大事件与特别大的零售TIPS基金流动相关。

30691.title: The Cost of Regulatory Compliance in the United States
30691.abstract: We quantify firms’ compliance costs of regulation from 2002 to 2014 in terms of their labor input expenditure to comply with government rules, a primary component of regulatory compliance spending for large portions of the U.S. economy. Detailed establishment-level occupation data, in combination with occupation-specific task information, allow us to recover the share of an establishment’s wage bill owing to employees engaged in regulatory compliance. Regulatory costs account on average for 1.34 percent of the total wage bill of a firm, but vary substantially across and within industries, and have increased over time. We investigate the returns to scale in regulatory compliance and find an inverted-U shape, with the percentage regulatory spending peaking for an establishment size of around 500 employees. Finally, we develop an instrumental variable methodology for decoupling the role of regulatory requirements from that of enforcement in driving firms’ compliance costs.
30691.zh_abstract: 我们量化了2002年至2014年间企业因遵守政府规则而投入的劳动力支出方面的监管合规成本，这是美国经济大部分领域监管合规支出的主要组成部分。详细的机构层面职业数据，结合职业特定任务信息，使我们能够恢复机构工资账单中因从事监管合规工作的员工所占的份额。监管成本平均占企业总工资账单的1.34%，但在行业间和行业内差异很大，并且随着时间的推移而增加。我们研究了监管合规的规模回报，发现呈倒U形，监管支出百分比在机构规模约为500名员工时达到峰值。最后，我们开发了一种工具变量方法，用于将监管要求的作用与执法在推动企业合规成本中的作用分离开来。

30690.title: Money (Not) to Burn: Payments for Ecosystem Services to Reduce Crop Residue Burning
30690.zh_title: 金钱（而非）焚烧：减少作物秸秆焚烧的生态系统服务付费
30690.authors: B. Kelsey Jack, Seema Jayachandran, Namrata Kala, Rohini Pande
30690.abstract: Particulate matter significantly reduces life expectancy in India. We use a randomized controlled trial in the Indian state of Punjab to evaluate the effectiveness of conditional cash transfers (also known as payments for ecosystem services, or PES) in reducing crop residue burning, which is a major contributor to the region’s poor air quality. Credit constraints and distrust may make farmers less likely to comply with standard PES contracts, which only pay the participant after verification of compliance. We randomize paying a portion of the money upfront and unconditionally. Despite receiving a lower reward for compliance, farmers offered partial upfront payment are 8-12 percentage points more likely to comply than are farmers offered the standard contract. Burning measures derived from satellite imagery indicate that PES with upfront payments significantly reduced burning, while standard PES payments were inframarginal. We also show that PES with an upfront component is a cost-effective way to improve India’s air quality.
30690.zh_abstract: 颗粒物显著降低了印度的预期寿命。我们在印度旁遮普邦使用随机对照试验来评估有条件现金转移（也称为生态系统服务付费，或PES）在减少作物秸秆焚烧方面的有效性，这是该地区空气质量差的主要原因。信贷约束和不信任可能使农民不太可能遵守标准的PES合同，该合同仅在验证合规后才向参与者付款。我们随机将一部分资金提前无条件支付。尽管因合规而获得的奖励较低，但获得部分预付款的农民比获得标准合同的农民合规可能性高8-12个百分点。来自卫星图像的焚烧测量表明，带有预付款的PES显著减少了焚烧，而标准PES支付是边际内的。我们还表明，带有预付款成分的PES是改善印度空气质量的一种成本效益高的方式。

30689.title: Supply Chain Resilience: Evidence from Indian Firms
30689.zh_title: 供应链韧性：来自印度企业的证据
30689.authors: Gaurav Khanna, Nicolas Morales, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar
30689.abstract: We characterize what features make supply chains more resilient. Using new data on the universe of firm-to-firm transactions from an Indian state, we identify firms with larger supplier exposure following the Covid-19 lockdowns. Using an event-study design we find firms with suppliers in strict-lockdown districts experienced higher separation rates and larger declines in inputs and sales. We study which characteristics increase supply-chain resilience. Firms that buy more complex products, with fewer available suppliers, are less likely to break links and face lower production disruptions. We explore how firms change post-shock supplier composition. Firms with higher supplier exposure form new links with larger and better-connected suppliers.
30689.zh_abstract: 我们刻画了哪些特征能使供应链更具韧性。利用来自印度某邦的企业间交易全量新数据，我们识别出在新冠疫情封锁后供应商风险敞口较大的企业。通过事件研究设计，我们发现，供应商位于严格封锁地区的企业，其合作关系断裂率更高，投入品和销售额下降幅度更大。我们研究了哪些特征能增强供应链韧性。购买更复杂产品、可替代供应商更少的企业，更不容易断裂合作关系，面临的生产中断也更小。我们探讨了企业在冲击后如何调整供应商构成。供应商风险敞口较高的企业会与规模更大、关联更广的供应商建立新合作关系。

30688.title: Predictable Price Pressure
30688.authors: Samuel M. Hartzmark, David H. Solomon
30688.abstract: We demonstrate that predictable uninformed cash flows forecast market and individual stock returns. Buying pressure from dividend payments (announced weeks prior) predicts higher value-weighted market returns, with returns for the top quintile of payment days four times higher than the lowest. This holds internationally, and increases when reinvestment is high and market liquidity is low. High stock expense firms have lower returns from selling pressure after blackout periods, by 117 b.p. in four days. We estimate market-level price multipliers of 1.5 to 2.3. These results suggest price pressure is a widespread result of flows, not an anomaly.
30688.zh_abstract: 我们证明，可预测的无信息现金流能够预测市场和个股回报。来自股息支付（提前数周公布）的买入压力预测了更高的市值加权市场回报，其中支付日最高五分位组的回报比最低组高出四倍。这一现象在国际上普遍存在，并且在再投资率高、市场流动性低时更为显著。高股票费用公司在禁售期后面临卖出压力，导致回报降低，四天内下降117个基点。我们估计市场层面的价格乘数为1.5至2.3。这些结果表明，价格压力是资金流动的普遍结果，而非异常现象。

30687.title: Employee Evaluation and Skill Investments: Evidence from Public School Teachers
30687.zh_title: 员工评估与技能投资：来自公立学校教师的证据
30687.abstract: When employees expect evaluation and performance incentives will continue (or begin) in the future, the potential future rewards create an incentive to invest in relevant skills today. Because skills benefit job performance, the effects of evaluation can persist after the rewards end or even anticipate the start of rewards. I provide empirical evidence of these dynamics from a quasi-experiment in Tennessee schools. New performance measures improve teachers’ value-added contributions to student achievement. But improvements are twice as large when the teacher also expects future rewards linked to future scores. Value-added remains at the now higher level after performance incentives end.
30687.zh_abstract: 当员工预期评估和绩效激励将在未来持续（或开始）时，潜在的未来回报会激励他们当下投资于相关技能。由于技能有益于工作表现，评估的效果可以在激励结束后持续存在，甚至在激励开始前就产生预期效应。我通过田纳西州学校的一项准实验为这些动态提供了经验证据。新的绩效衡量标准提高了教师对学生成绩的增值贡献。但当教师也预期未来分数与未来回报挂钩时，改进幅度是前者的两倍。在绩效激励结束后，增值贡献仍保持在更高的水平。

30686.title: Teachers’ Use of Class Time and Student Achievement
30686.zh_title: 教师课堂时间分配与学生成绩
30686.authors: Simon M. Burgess, Shenila Rawal, Eric S. Taylor
30686.abstract: We study teachers’ choices about how to allocate class time across different instructional activities, for example, lecturing, open discussion, or individual practice. Our data come from secondary schools in England, specifically classes preceding GCSE exams. Students score higher in math when their teacher devotes more class time to individual practice and assessment. In contrast, students score higher in English if there is more discussion and work with classmates. Class time allocation predicts test scores separate from the quality of the teacher’s instruction during the activities. These results suggest opportunities to improve student achievement without changes in teachers’ skills.
30686.zh_abstract: 我们研究了教师如何将课堂时间分配给不同的教学活动，例如讲授、公开讨论或个人练习。我们的数据来自英国的中学，特别是GCSE考试前的班级。当数学老师将更多课堂时间用于个人练习和评估时，学生的数学成绩更高。相比之下，如果英语课上有更多的讨论和与同学合作，学生的英语成绩更高。课堂时间分配对考试成绩的预测作用独立于教师在这些活动中的教学质量。这些结果表明，在不改变教师技能的情况下，存在提高学生成绩的机会。

30685.title: Families, Labor Markets, and Policy
30685.zh_title: 家庭、劳动力市场与政策
30685.authors: Stefania Albanesi, Claudia Olivetti, Barbara Petrongolo
30685.abstract: Using comparable data for 24 countries since the 1970s, we document gender convergence in schooling, employment and earnings, marriage delay and the accompanying decline in fertility, and the large remaining gaps in labor market outcomes, especially among parents. A model of time allocation illustrates how the specialization of spouses in home or market production responds to preferences, comparative advantages and public policies. We draw lessons from existing evidence on the impacts of family policies on women's careers and children's wellbeing. There is to date little or no evidence of beneficial effects of longer parental leave (or fathers' quotas) on maternal participation and earnings. In most cases longer leave delays mothers' return to work, without long-lasting consequences on their careers. More generous childcare funding instead encourages female participation whenever subsidized childcare replaces maternal childcare. Impacts on child development depend on counterfactual childcare arrangements and tend to be more beneficial for disadvantaged households. In-work benefits targeted to low-earners have clear positive impacts on lone mothers' employment and negligible impacts on other groups. While most of this literature takes policy as exogenous, political economy aspects of policy adoption help understand the interplay between societal changes, family policies and gender equality.
30685.zh_abstract: 利用自20世纪70年代以来24个国家的可比数据，我们记录了性别在受教育程度、就业和收入方面的趋同、婚姻推迟以及随之而来的生育率下降，以及劳动力市场结果中仍然存在的巨大差距，尤其是在父母群体中。一个时间分配模型说明了配偶在家务或市场生产中的专业化如何响应偏好、比较优势和公共政策。我们从现有关于家庭政策对女性职业生涯和儿童福祉影响的证据中汲取经验教训。迄今为止，几乎没有或根本没有证据表明更长的育儿假（或父亲配额）对母亲的劳动参与和收入有有益影响。在大多数情况下，更长的假期会延迟母亲重返工作岗位，而不会对其职业生涯产生长期影响。相反，更慷慨的儿童保育资助会在补贴保育替代母亲保育时鼓励女性参与。对儿童发展的影响取决于反事实的保育安排，并且往往对弱势家庭更有利。针对低收入者的在职福利对单身母亲的就业有明确的积极影响，而对其他群体的影响微乎其微。虽然大多数文献将政策视为外生变量，但政策采纳的政治经济学方面有助于理解社会变革、家庭政策和性别平等之间的相互作用。

30684.title: The Impact of Oil and Gas Extraction on Infant Health
30684.zh_title: 油气开采对婴儿健康的影响
30684.abstract: The benefits and costs of resource extraction are currently being hotly debated in the case of unconventional natural gas development (commonly known as “fracking"). Colorado provides a unique research environment to study the health impacts of conventional and unconventional forms of oil and gas development (OGD) given its long history of conventional OGD and recent expansion of unconventional OGD. I utilize detailed vital statistics and the mother's residential address to define proximity to drilling activity. Using a difference-in-differences model that compares mothers residing within 1 km to mothers residing 1 - 5 km of a well (before and during/after drilling), I find that proximity to wells before birth increases adverse birth outcomes and pregnancy-related complications. I find impacts on the extensive and intensive margins and across well types. I also present results suggesting no impacts on fertility or mobility. These results are robust to multiple specifications and suggest that policies to mitigate against the risks of living near OGD may be warranted.
30684.zh_abstract: 在非常规天然气开发（通常称为“水力压裂”）的案例中，资源开采的收益和成本目前正受到激烈争论。科罗拉多州因其悠久的常规油气开发历史和近期非常规油气开发的扩张，为研究常规和非常规形式油气开发对健康的影响提供了独特的研究环境。我利用详细的生命统计数据和母亲的居住地址来定义与钻井活动的邻近程度。使用双重差分模型，比较居住在油井1公里以内的母亲与居住在油井1至5公里范围内的母亲（在钻井前、钻井期间/之后），我发现出生前靠近油井会增加不良出生结局和妊娠相关并发症的风险。我发现了在广延边际和集约边际上以及不同井型之间的影响。我还提出了表明对生育率或流动性没有影响的结果。这些结果对多种设定具有稳健性，并表明有必要制定政策来减轻居住在油气开发附近的风险。

30683.title: Responsible Sourcing? Theory and Evidence from Costa Rica
30683.zh_title: 负责任采购？来自哥斯达黎加的理论与证据
30683.authors: Alonso Alfaro-Urena, Benjamin Faber, Cecile Gaubert, Isabela Manelici, Jose P. Vasquez
30683.abstract: Multinational enterprises (MNEs) increasingly impose “Responsible Sourcing” (RS) standards on their suppliers worldwide, including requirements on worker compensation, benefits and working conditions. Are these policies just “hot air” or do they impact exposed suppliers and their workers? What is the welfare incidence of RS in sourcing countries? To answer these questions, we develop a quantitative general equilibrium (GE) model of RS and combine it with a unique new database. In the theory, we show that the welfare implications of RS are ambiguous, depending on an interplay between what is akin to an export tax (+) and a labor market distortion (–). Empirically, we combine the near-universe of RS rollouts by MNE subsidiaries in Costa Rica since 2009 with firm-to-firm transactions and matched employer-employee microdata. We find that RS rollouts lead to significant reductions in firm sales and employment at exposed suppliers, an increase in their salaries to initially low-wage workers and a reduction in their low-wage employment share. We then use the estimated effects and the microdata to calibrate the model and quantify GE counterfactuals. We find that while MNE RS policies have led to significant gains among the roughly one third of low-wage workers employed at exposed suppliers ex ante, the majority of low-wage workers lose due to adverse indirect effects on their wages and the domestic price index.
30683.zh_abstract: 跨国企业越来越多地对其全球供应商施加“负责任采购”标准，包括对工人薪酬、福利和工作条件的要求。这些政策仅仅是“空谈”，还是会影响受影响的供应商及其工人？负责任采购在采购国的福利影响如何？为了回答这些问题，我们开发了一个负责任采购的定量一般均衡模型，并将其与一个独特的新数据库相结合。在理论上，我们表明负责任采购的福利影响是模糊的，取决于类似于出口税（+）和劳动力市场扭曲（–）之间的相互作用。在实证上，我们将自2009年以来哥斯达黎加跨国企业子公司负责任采购推广的近乎全量数据与企业间交易以及匹配的雇主-雇员微观数据相结合。我们发现，负责任采购的推广导致受影响供应商的企业销售额和就业显著下降，其最初低工资工人的工资增加，以及低工资就业份额减少。然后，我们利用估计效应和微观数据来校准模型并量化一般均衡反事实。我们发现，虽然跨国企业的负责任采购政策使事前受影响的供应商中约三分之一的低工资工人获得了显著收益，但由于对其工资和国内价格指数的负面间接影响，大多数低工资工人遭受了损失。

30682.title: Funding Black High-Growth Startups
30682.zh_title: 资助黑人高增长初创企业
30682.authors: Lisa D. Cook, Matt Marx, Emmanuel Yimfor
30682.abstract: We analyze determinants of access to venture capital for Black founders of high-growth startups. We combine image- and name-processing algorithms with clerical review to identify race for over 100,000 startup founders “at risk” for venture funding. Black founders raise roughly one-third as much venture capital in the five years after founding vs. other startups formed in the same year, industry, and state. What explains the gap? We attribute about a third of the gap to four factors: Black startups have smaller founding teams; Black founders are less likely to have worked at the same companies or attended the same schools as investors who fund startups in the same industry and geography; Black startups are less likely to be located in geographies with plentiful venture capital, and Black startups are less likely to have a patent. We then bound our estimates of the funding gap and show that, to explain the gap, omitted variables would have to be nearly four times as important as the variables we fix. The funding gap is not statistically different from zero in later funding stages (post Series B), suggesting that some investors initially hold—but later amend—incorrect beliefs about Black-founded startups. We also exploit the hiring of Black partners and show that they are more likely to fund successful Black startups, consistent with segmented networks.
30682.zh_abstract: 我们分析了黑人创始人创办的高增长初创企业获得风险投资的决定因素。我们将图像和姓名处理算法与文书审查相结合，以识别超过10万名“有风险”获得风险投资的初创企业创始人的种族。在成立后的五年内，黑人创始人筹集的风险资本大约是同一年、同一行业和同一州成立的其他初创企业的三分之一。是什么造成了这一差距？我们将大约三分之一的差距归因于四个因素：黑人初创企业的创始团队规模较小；黑人创始人不太可能曾在与投资同一行业和地理区域初创企业的投资者相同的公司工作或就读相同的学校；黑人初创企业不太可能位于风险投资充足的地理区域；以及黑人初创企业不太可能拥有专利。然后，我们界定了资金缺口估计值的范围，并表明，要解释这一缺口，遗漏变量的重要性必须是我们所固定变量的近四倍。在后期融资阶段（B轮之后），资金缺口在统计上与零无显著差异，这表明一些投资者最初对黑人创办的初创企业持有错误的信念，但后来修正了这些信念。我们还利用了黑人合伙人的招聘情况，并表明他们更有可能资助成功的黑人初创企业，这与细分网络的观点一致。

30680.title: Overcoming Behavioral Impediments to Maternal Care: Experimental Evidence on Domain Knowledge and Nudgeability from Recalcitrant Pakistan
30680.zh_title: 克服孕产妇护理的行为障碍：来自顽固巴基斯坦的领域知识与可助推性实验证据
30680.authors: Musharraf R. Cyan, Resul Cesur, Yasin Civelek, Bauyrzhan Yedgenov, Richard Rothenberg
30680.abstract: We conducted a large-scale field experiment to calibrate phone messaging to its potential of overcoming behavioral barriers to maternal care uptake in the countryside of a developing country, where a significant share of women forgoes life-saving maternity-related care even when within reach. The high-arching goal of our intervention is to test if and to what extent filling out insufficient domain knowledge (i.e., childbearing-related health literacy) generates responsiveness to nudges for adopting maternal care among the rural poor of Pakistan. We find that informational nudges sent in a random order using the appropriate medium of communication, voice messages, during pregnancy significantly improve care-seeking behaviors, measured by antenatal care, postpartum checkup, and postnatal visits, through improved literacy. Importantly, we document that high-frequency voice calls timed to gestational age substantially increase the efficacy of informational nudges, including boosting facility deliveries, once domain knowledge is built and nudgeability established. Nevertheless, small financial incentives trump the productivity of informational voice calls in both improving health literacy and boosting care uptake, likely due to participants equating the intrinsic value of the intended behavioral change to the size of the monetary reward. These results are scalable to a large number of populations across developing nations.
30680.zh_abstract: 我们进行了一项大规模实地实验，以校准电话信息传递在克服发展中国家农村地区孕产妇护理采纳行为障碍方面的潜力，在这些地区，相当一部分女性即使能够获得可挽救生命的孕产相关护理，也会放弃使用。我们干预的首要目标是测试，在巴基斯坦农村贫困人口中，填补领域知识（即与生育相关的健康素养）的不足是否以及在多大程度上能产生对采纳孕产妇护理助推措施的反应性。我们发现，在孕期使用适当的沟通媒介（语音信息）以随机顺序发送的信息性助推措施，通过提高健康素养，显著改善了护理寻求行为，这通过产前护理、产后检查和产后访视来衡量。重要的是，我们记录到，一旦领域知识建立且可助推性确立，根据孕周定时发送的高频语音电话能显著提高信息性助推措施的效果，包括提高机构分娩率。尽管如此，小额经济激励在改善健康素养和促进护理采纳方面都优于信息性语音电话的生产力，这可能是由于参与者将预期行为改变的内在价值等同于货币奖励的规模。这些结果可推广到发展中国家的广大人群。

30699.title: Picking Winners? Government Subsidies and Firm Productivity in China
30699.zh_title: 挑选赢家？中国政府补贴与企业生产率
30699.authors: Lee G. Branstetter, Guangwei Li, Mengjia Ren
30699.abstract: Are Chinese industrial policies making the targeted Chinese firms more productive? Alternatively, are efforts to promote productivity undercut by efforts to maintain or expand employment in less productive enterprises? In this paper, we attempt to shed light on these questions through the analysis of previously underutilized microdata on direct government subsidies provided to China’s publicly traded firms. We categorize subsidies into different types. We then estimate total-factor productivity (TFP) for Chinese listed firms and investigate the relationship between these estimates of TFP and the allocation of government subsidies. We find little evidence that the Chinese government consistently “picks winners”. Firms’ ex-ante productivity is negatively correlated with subsidies received by firms, and subsidies appear to have a negative impact on firms’ ex-post productivity growth throughout our data window, 2007 to 2018. Neither subsidies given out under the name of R&D and innovation promotion nor industrial and equipment upgrading positively affect firms’ productivity growth. On the other hand, we find a positive impact of subsidy on current year employment, both for the aggregated and employment-related subsidies. These findings suggest that China’s increasingly prescriptive industrial policies may have generated limited effects in promoting productivity.
30699.zh_abstract: 中国的产业政策是否让目标中国企业变得更具生产力？或者，提高生产力的努力是否被维持或扩大低生产率企业就业的努力所削弱？在本文中，我们试图通过分析先前未充分利用的关于中国上市公司直接政府补贴的微观数据来阐明这些问题。我们将补贴分为不同类型。然后，我们估计了中国上市公司的全要素生产率（TFP），并研究了这些TFP估计值与政府补贴分配之间的关系。我们几乎没有发现中国政府一贯“挑选赢家”的证据。企业的事前生产率与所获补贴呈负相关，并且在整个数据窗口期（2007年至2018年），补贴似乎对企业的事后生产率增长产生了负面影响。无论是名义上用于研发和创新促进的补贴，还是用于工业和设备升级的补贴，都没有对企业的生产率增长产生积极影响。另一方面，我们发现补贴对当年就业有积极影响，无论是总体补贴还是与就业相关的补贴。这些发现表明，中国日益指令性的产业政策在促进生产率方面可能效果有限。

30698.title: Taxes and the Labor Supply of the Stars
30698.zh_title: 税收与明星的劳动供给
30698.authors: Daniel Keniston, Abigail Allison M. Peralta
30698.abstract: Do high taxes cause superstars to work less? We test this hypothesis using complete data on Hollywood movie stars' labor supply from 1927 to 2014. Changes to marginal tax rates in high tax brackets have no significant effect on the number of films a movie star makes each year. However, in years with high taxes, stars produce more highly rated movies with award-winning directors, potentially substituting prestigious films for pecuniary gains
30698.zh_abstract: 高税收会导致超级明星减少工作吗？我们利用1927年至2014年好莱坞电影明星劳动供给的完整数据来检验这一假设。高税率等级边际税率的变化对电影明星每年制作的电影数量没有显著影响。然而，在高税收年份，明星会制作更多评价更高、与获奖导演合作的电影，可能用声望高的电影替代金钱收益。

30639.title: The Regulation of Medical AI: Policy Approaches, Data, and Innovation Incentives
30639.zh_title: 医疗人工智能的监管：政策方法、数据与创新激励
30639.abstract: For those who follow health and technology news, it is difficult to go more than a few days without reading about a compelling new application of Artificial Intelligence (AI) to health care. AI has myriad applications in medicine and its adjacent industries, with AI-driven tools already in use in basic science, translational medicine, and numerous corners of health care delivery, including administrative work, diagnosis, and treatment. In diagnosis and treatment, a large and growing number of AI tools meet the statutory definition of a medical device or that of an in-vitro diagnostic. Those that do are subject to regulation by local authorities, resulting in both practical and strategic implications for manufacturers, along with a more complex set of innovation incentives. This chapter presents background on medical device regulation—especially as it relates to software products—and quantitatively describes the emergence of AI among FDA-regulated products. The empirical section of this chapter explores characteristics of AI-supported/driven medical devices (“AI devices”) in the United States. It presents data on their origins (by firm type and country), their safety profiles (as measured by associated adverse events and recalls), and concludes with a discussion of the implications of regulation for innovation incentives in medical AI.
30639.zh_abstract: 对于那些关注健康和技术新闻的人来说，很难超过几天不读到关于人工智能在医疗保健领域令人信服的新应用。人工智能在医学及其相关行业有无数应用，人工智能驱动的工具已用于基础科学、转化医学以及医疗保健服务的众多角落，包括行政工作、诊断和治疗。在诊断和治疗方面，大量且不断增长的人工智能工具符合医疗器械或体外诊断的法定定义。那些符合定义的器械需接受当地监管机构的监管，这给制造商带来了实际和战略上的影响，以及一套更复杂的创新激励。本章介绍了医疗器械监管的背景——特别是与软件产品相关的部分，并定量描述了人工智能在FDA监管产品中的出现。本章的实证部分探讨了美国人工智能支持/驱动的医疗器械（“人工智能设备”）的特征。它提供了关于其来源（按公司类型和国家）、安全概况（以相关不良事件和召回衡量）的数据，并最后讨论了监管对医疗人工智能创新激励的影响。
